meta.notes: Augmented from local Foundry checkout at temp/foundry-pf2e (max 2000).

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: Hurl a glob of acid at a target. Spell attack dealing acid damage. On a hit, also deals splash damage to adjacent creatures. Persistent acid damage on critical hit.

heightening.perInterval: The initial damage increases by 1d6 and persistent acid increases by 1 every 2 ranks

spells.name: Ancient Dust
spells.description: You cough up a cloud of gray soil, echoing the dust in the graves of Kemnebi's many victims.

spells.name: Approximate
spells.description: Area 1 cubic foot Your magic quickly flows over an area to help you count and catalog.

spells.name: Bramble Bush
spells.description: In a sudden burst of growth, you cause a thorned bush to sprout from the ground, lash around, and wither.

spells.name: Bullhorn
spells.description: You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance.

spells.name: Caustic Blast
spells.description: You fling a splash of acid that coats the target. Reflex basic save. On a critical failure, the target also takes persistent acid damage.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Dancing Blade
spells.description: You telekinetically animate a weapon to fight on its own. Make a melee spell attack using a weapon you're holding. On a hit, deal the weapon's damage dice + your spellcasting modifier. The weapon can flank.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d8 for each rank

spells.name: Daze
spells.description: Push into the target's mind with a mental jolt (Will basic save, stunned 1 on crit fail)

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d6 every 2 ranks

spells.name: Deep Breath
spells.description: You take an incredibly deep breath and can hold it for the spell's duration.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: Sense whether magic is nearby. You detect the presence of magic auras in a 30-foot emanation. You can determine the school of each aura.

spells.name: Detect Metal
spells.description: You attune yourself to magnetic fields, becoming aware of the presence or absence of metallic objects, veins, and deposits within the area.

spells.name: Divine Lance
spells.description: You unleash a beam of divine energy. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 spirit damage (double damage on a critical hit). Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

spells.name: Draw Moisture
spells.description: You draw water out of an object, possibly to clean up spills or quickly dry a soaked book or shirt.

spells.name: Eat Fire
spells.description: Trigger You would take fire damage. You consume and ingest fire, making it less harmful to you. You gain resistance 5 to fire damage until the end of the current turn. During the remaining duration of the spell, you can…

spells.name: Electric Arc
spells.description: An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another (1-2 targets, Reflex basic save)

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Elemental Counter
spells.description: Trigger You or a creature within 60 feet rolls a saving throw against a spell with the earth, fire, metal, plant, water, or wood trait, or are targeted by a spell attack with such a trait.

spells.name: Figment
spells.description: You create a brief, illusory image of an object, creature, or some other visual phenomenon. The image can't produce sound, smell, or other sensory effects. You Sustain the spell to move the illusion up to 10 feet.

spells.name: Forbidden Thought
spells.description: Plant a hostile thought in the target's mind. Will save — on failure target takes mental damage and a -2 status penalty to attack rolls until end of your next turn. Amp: also stunned 1 on failure.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d6 for each rank

spells.name: Forbidding Ward
spells.description: You ward an ally against the attacks and hostile spells from the target enemy.

spells.name: Frost's Touch
spells.description: Your gelid shard drinks down nearby heat in a futile attempt to sate itself and achieve a level of frigid cold unheard of in the Universe.

spells.name: Frostbite
spells.description: An orb of biting cold strikes a target (spell attack). Deals cold damage.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Frostbite
spells.description: An orb of biting cold coalesces around your target, freezing its body.

spells.name: Gale Blast
spells.description: Wind flows from your outstretched hands and whirls around you in a 5-foot emanation.

spells.name: Ghost Sound
spells.description: You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting.

spells.name: Glamorize
spells.description: Using simple magical gestures, you alter a minor detail of your appearance (add or remove highlights to your hair color, apply or remove cosmetics, add polish or accessories to your nails, etc.) or create a small enviro…

spells.name: Glass Shield
spells.description: You summon a layer of clear glass to keep you from harm.

spells.name: Glimpse Weakness
spells.description: You glimpse a flaw in the target's armor or stance, granting your next attack against that target within 1 round a +1 status bonus to the attack roll and ignoring 2 points of the target's resistance.

spells.name: Glowing Trail
spells.description: Your movements leave a vague glowing path behind you, like a misty echo of your presence.

spells.name: Gouging Claw
spells.description: Morph your limb into a claw and strike. Melee spell attack dealing slashing damage. On a critical hit, the target also takes persistent bleed damage.

heightening.perInterval: The slashing damage increases by 1d6 for each rank

spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: You ask for divine guidance, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends.

spells.name: Haunting Hymn
spells.description: You echo a jarring hymn that only creatures in the area can hear.

spells.name: Healing Plaster
spells.description: You purify some dirt or mud into a pliable, claylike plaster that can aid in clotting and healing.

spells.name: Ignition
spells.description: Snap your fingers and ignite a target with fire (spell attack, persistent fire on crit)

heightening.perInterval: The initial damage increases by 1d4 and persistent fire damage on crit increases by 1d4

spells.name: Ignition
spells.description: You snap your fingers and point at a target, which begins to smolder.

spells.name: Illuminate
spells.description: You light all non-magical light sources in the area that use fire to provide their light—such as candles, lamps, and sconces.

spells.name: Imaginary Weapon
spells.description: Conjure a weapon from pure thought and Strike. Melee spell attack dealing bludgeoning damage. Amp: extra damage die and Push 10ft on crit.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d8 for each rank

spells.name: Infectious Enthusiasm
spells.description: With enchanted gusto, you encourage yourself to get things done and share your motivation with your allies.

spells.name: Inside Ropes
spells.description: You pull a large handful of guts from your midsection.

spells.name: Invoke True Name
spells.description: You speak the true name of a creature to more surely affect it with your magic.

spells.name: Join Pasts
spells.description: With touches to the targets' foreheads, you bring them into mental communion.

spells.name: Know the Way
spells.description: In your mind's eye, you magically reorient yourself.

spells.name: Light
spells.description: The object glows, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius. If cast on a creature, the creature must attempt a Fortitude save.

spells.name: Live Wire
spells.description: You conjure up a length of sharp copper filament humming with electrical current that strikes out at your foe.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.description: Create a spectral hand that can grab or manipulate a small unattended object within range. Sustained.

spells.name: Message
spells.description: Whisper a message to a distant creature that only it can hear. The target can reply in a whisper only you can hear.

spells.name: Musical Accompaniment
spells.description: You're surrounded by orchestral music that shifts and changes to match your behavior.

spells.name: Needle Darts
spells.description: You shape three needles out of metal in your vicinity and fling them at a target. Make a spell attack roll. The needles deal piercing damage.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Phase Bolt
spells.description: Fire a bolt of psychic energy that passes through barriers. Ranged spell attack dealing piercing damage. Ignores lesser cover and cover.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.description: The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform minor magical tricks for 1 hour.

spells.name: Protect Companion
spells.description: You extend your aura, as a magical shield that protects your eidolon or minion.

spells.name: Puff of Poison
spells.description: You exhale a shimmering cloud of toxic breath at an enemy's face.

spells.name: Read Aura
spells.description: You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras.

spells.name: Read the Air
spells.description: You take a deep breath as you survey a social situation, showing courtesy to all around you as your intuition swiftly picks up clues about social contexts and unspoken assumptions of behavior.

spells.name: Redistribute Potential
spells.description: You draw thermal energy from one target and infuse it into another. One target takes cold damage and the other takes fire damage with a basic Fortitude save.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Root Reading
spells.description: You gain general insights into the immediate vicinity by sending your sense through the root systems of trees and bushes.

spells.name: Rousing Splash
spells.description: You cause a splash of cold water to descend on an ally's head, granting some temporary vigor.

spells.name: Scatter Scree
spells.description: Rocks and stones scatter in a 15-foot cone, dealing bludgeoning damage (Reflex basic save). The ground becomes difficult terrain until end of your next turn.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: Raise a magical shield of force (+1 circumstance bonus to AC, Hardness 5 for Shield Block)

spells.name: Sigil
spells.description: You harmlessly place your unique magical sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on the targeted creature or object.

spells.name: Slashing Gust
spells.description: You slash your hand through the air, channeling miniature ripples of air from each finger to slice your enemy.

spells.name: Spout
spells.description: Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air.

spells.name: Stabilize
spells.description: Life energy shuts death's door. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dying] condition, though it remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Unconscious] at 0 Hit Points.

spells.name: Summon Instrument
spells.description: You materialize a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Musical Instrument (Handheld)] in your grasp.

spells.name: Take Root
spells.description: Roots sprout from the flesh of the target and coil across the floor or around objects, reinforcing their stance or grip.

spells.name: Tame
spells.description: As you make comforting sounds and gestures, you approach the target in a friendly manner combining caution and confidence.

spells.name: Tangle Vine
spells.description: A vine appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target.

spells.name: Telekinetic Hand
spells.description: You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction.

spells.name: Telekinetic Projectile
spells.description: Hurl a loose object at a target with telekinesis (spell attack)

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d6 for each rank

spells.name: Telekinetic Rend
spells.description: Your telekinetic powers rip at a foe's body. Deal bludgeoning damage on a basic Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also knocked prone.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d6 for each rank

spells.name: Timber
spells.description: You create a small dead tree in your space that falls over on anyone in its path, then immediately decomposes.

spells.name: Time Sense
spells.description: When you Cast the Spell, you gain a perfect sense of time.

spells.name: Torturous Trauma
spells.description: With this spell born of Kemnebi's sadistic love of torture, you batter a creature's internal organs, leaving no external signs of the immense pain you delivered.

spells.name: Tremor Signs
spells.description: You send a series of tremors, no longer than a short sentence of speech, toward your target.

spells.name: Vitality Lash
spells.description: You unleash a beam of vital energy at a target. Fortitude basic save dealing vitality damage. Undead and creatures with void healing take extra damage.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Void Warp
spells.description: You call upon the Void to harm a living target. Fortitude basic save dealing void damage. On a critical failure, the target is enfeebled 1 for 1 round.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank

spells.name: Warp Step
spells.description: Gain a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed until end of turn (+10ft with The Unbound Step), then Stride twice. Amp: Cast as 1 action instead of 2. Amp Heightened (4th): Teleport yourself instead of Striding (range = 2x Speed, teleportation trait).

spells.name: Wash Your Luck
spells.description: Some practitioners argue this spell literally washes your fortunes of all influences, malign or benign, while others claim it simply cleanses your mind of obsessions about luck and destiny.

spells.name: 500 Toads
spells.description: You conjure hundreds of magical toads to fill the area and hop around.

spells.name: Acidic Burst
spells.description: You create a shell of acid around yourself that immediately bursts outward, dealing 2d6 acid damage to each creature in the area with a basic Reflex save. Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

spells.name: Adapt Self
spells.description: You make subtle changes to your body to adapt to the situation.

spells.name: Admonishing Ray
spells.description: A ray of energy bludgeons your target into submission without causing lasting harm.

spells.name: Agile Feet
spells.description: The blessings of your god make your feet faster and your movements more fluid.

spells.name: Agitate
spells.description: You send the target's mind and body into overdrive, forcing it to become restless and hyperactive.

spells.name: Air Bubble
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range enters an environment where it can't breathe.

spells.name: Airburst
spells.description: A blast of wind wildly pushes everything nearby.

spells.name: Alarm
spells.description: You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission.

spells.name: All-Encompassing Hunger
spells.description: You reach out to devour a life, regardless of whether you need it for sustenance.

spells.name: Ancestral Memories
spells.description: The memories of long-dead spellcasters grant you their knowledge, making your spells more formidable.

spells.name: Ancestral Touch
spells.description: You touch a creature and force them to see and feel the ancestors surrounding you.

spells.name: Angelic Halo
spells.description: You gain an angelic halo with an aura that increases allies' healing from the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Heal] spell.

spells.name: Animal Allies
spells.description: You summon tiny, ordinary animals from the environment, such as insects, birds, or fish, to quickly lash out at nearby foes.

spells.name: Animate Rope
spells.description: You cause a length or section of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Rope] or a rope-like object to animate and follow simple commands.

spells.name: Ant Haul
spells.description: You reinforce the target's musculoskeletal system to bear more weight.

spells.name: Anticipate Peril
spells.description: You grant the target brief foresight. The target gains a +1 status bonus to its next initiative roll, after which the spell ends. Heightened (+2) The status bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank. @UUID[Co…

spells.name: Appearance of Wealth
spells.description: You create a brief vision of immense wealth filling the spell's area.

spells.name: Aqueous Blast
spells.description: You evoke a mass of water into the air around your outstretched fist.

spells.name: Armor of Thorn and Claw
spells.description: Razor-sharp thorns and claws erupt from your skin or scales.

spells.name: Arms of Nature
spells.description: All wood, dead or alive, is your armory. When you cast this spell, you draw forth a +1 weapon of your choice from the target. The weapon must be 2 Bulk or less. This weapon is of the same material as the target. Heighte…

spells.name: Ashen Wind
spells.description: You conjure a swirling wind of ashes that blows through the area.

spells.name: Athletic Rush
spells.description: Your body fills with physical power and skill.

spells.name: Augmented Body
spells.description: You magically augment your body with clockwork parts and magitech innovations.

spells.name: Bane
spells.description: A dirge fills a 15-foot emanation around you. Enemies that fail a Will save take a -1 status penalty to attack rolls. Sustained.

spells.name: Barbed Spear
spells.description: You conjure a vicious barbed spear and hurl it at a foe.

spells.name: Befuddle
spells.description: You sow seeds of confusion in your target's mind, causing its actions and thoughts to become clumsy.

spells.name: Benediction
spells.description: Divine protection helps protect your companions.

spells.name: Beseech the Sphinx
spells.description: You look to the great Sphinx constellation, wisest of all cosmic guides and favored of Phimater, asking them to lend their insight to the target.

spells.name: Bit of Luck
spells.description: You tilt the scales of luck slightly to protect a creature from disaster.

spells.name: Biting Words
spells.description: You entwine magic with your voice, causing your taunts and jibes to physically harm your enemies.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: Blessings from your deity flow outward. You and allies in a 15-foot emanation gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls. Sustained.

spells.name: Blood Ward
spells.description: Your patron's aegis descends to shield a target from harm.

spells.name: Brain Drain
spells.description: You probe the target's mind to glean knowledge.

spells.name: Breadcrumbs
spells.description: You protect your target from going astray in hostile territory by tracking where it's already been, helping it deduce where it still needs to go.

spells.name: Breathe Fire
spells.description: A gout of flame sprays from your mouth in a 15-foot cone

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 1st

spells.name: Breathe Fire
spells.description: A gout of flame sprays from your mouth. You deal 2d6 fire damage to creatures in the area with a basic Reflex save. Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

spells.name: Briny Bolt
spells.description: You hurl a bolt of saltwater from your extended hand.

spells.name: Buffeting Winds
spells.description: You release a quick burst of wind that batters your living opponents without causing them lasting harm, while also blowing undead away.

spells.name: Buoyant Bubbles
spells.description: You create a thin layer of foamy bubbles that adhere to the target, causing it to float in water and similar liquids.

spells.name: Cackle
spells.description: With a quick burst of laughter, you prolong a magical effect you created. You Sustain a spell.

spells.name: Call of the Grave
spells.description: You fire a ray of sickening energy. Make a spell attack roll. Critical Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Slowed]{Slo…

spells.name: Call to Arms
spells.description: Trigger You are about to roll for initiative.

spells.name: Camel Spit
spells.description: You alter your stomach, esophagus, and tongue to be able to spit partially digested food with force.

spells.name: Carryall
spells.description: A small platform of magical force materializes adjacent to you to carry cargo.

spells.name: Celestial Accord
spells.description: You intervene in a heated disagreement between two creatures, encouraging them to put aside their differences and find some common ground.

spells.name: Charged Javelin
spells.description: You fire a javelin of electricity that leaves a charged field around its target.

spells.name: Charm
spells.description: To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze.

spells.name: Charming Push
spells.description: You push at the target's mind to deflect their ire.

spells.name: Charming Touch
spells.description: You infuse your target with attraction, causing it to act friendlier toward you.

spells.name: Chastising Retort
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range attempts a Deception check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Lie] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Feint].

spells.name: Chilling Spray
spells.description: A cone of icy shards bursts from your spread hands and coats the targets in a layer of frost.

spells.name: Cinder Gaze
spells.description: You've learned to read the future in the patterns of flames and smoke.

spells.name: Cleanse Cuisine
spells.description: You transform all food and beverages in the area into delicious fare, changing water into wine or another fine beverage, or enhancing the food's taste and ingredients to make it a gourmet treat.

spells.name: Cloak of Shadow
spells.description: You drape the target in a mantle of swirling shadows that make it harder to see.

spells.name: Clouded Focus
spells.description: You sharpen a creature's senses, though more distant objects become hazy, indistinct, or muted to it.

spells.name: Color Spray
spells.description: Swirling colors dazzle targets in a 15-foot cone. Will save — stunned 1 on failure, stunned 1 and blinded for 1 round on critical failure.

spells.name: Command
spells.description: Shout a command to a creature. Will save — on failure the target must follow the command on its next turn (approach, drop, flee, grovel, or stand still).

fixedLevels.5: You can target up to 10 creatures

spells.name: Concordant Choir
spells.description: You unleash a dangerous consonance of reverberating sound, focusing on a single target or spreading out to damage many foes.

spells.name: Conductive Weapon
spells.description: You channel powerful electric current through the metal of a weapon, zapping anyone the item hits.

spells.name: Cornucopia
spells.description: Vines twine into a wicker horn in your hands, and out spills a single fruit, nut, or similar small bit of produce.

spells.name: Counter Performance
spells.description: Trigger You or an ally within 60 feet rolls a saving throw against an auditory or visual effect.

spells.name: Create Water
spells.description: As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them. You create 2 gallons of water. If no one drinks it, it evaporates after 1 day.

spells.name: Creative Splash
spells.description: A deluge of paint or colorful illusions descend on the area, reflecting your personal creative specialty.

spells.name: Crescent Scepter
spells.description: You hold up any object, which takes on the appearance of glowing regalia in the eyes of those who look on you, representing the political or religious institute most feared by each creature.

spells.name: Crown of Prophets
spells.description: Serpents sprout from your head, equally ready to bite your foes or offer you counsel.

spells.name: Crushing Ground
spells.description: You tear open the ground then slam it shut.

spells.name: Cry of Destruction
spells.description: Your voice booms, smashing what's in front of you.

spells.name: Curse of Recoil
spells.description: Trigger An enemy you can see is about to make a ranged attack.

spells.name: Cutting Eye
spells.description: Trigger You are the target of an attack or must attempt a saving throw against a spell.

spells.name: Cycle of Retribution
spells.description: An understanding of how violence begets more violence fills your target, causing it mental anguish in the form of splitting headaches when it attempts to take violent actions.

spells.name: Darkened Forest Form
spells.description: Your apparition casts a feral shadow over your form.

spells.name: Dazzling Flash
spells.description: You raise your religious symbol and create a blinding flash of light.

spells.name: Death's Call
spells.description: Trigger A living creature within 20 feet of you dies, or an undead creature within 20 feet of you is destroyed.

spells.name: Debilitating Terror
spells.description: You fill the target's mind with terrifying images to disrupt their combat focus.

spells.name: Defended by Spirits
spells.description: You entreat a spirit or the spiritual energies in your location to surround and protect an ally from an certain foe.

spells.name: Dehydrate
spells.description: You stir the inner fire of all things within the area, driving out moisture.

spells.name: Déjà Vu
spells.description: You loop a thought process in the target's mind, forcing it to repeat a moment's worth of actions.

spells.name: Delay Consequence
spells.description: Trigger A creature or object within range is hit by an attack.

spells.name: Detect Alignment
spells.description: Your eyes glow as you sense aligned auras.

spells.name: Detect Poison
spells.description: You detect whether a creature is venomous or poisonous, or if an object is poison or has been poisoned.

spells.name: Devouring Dark Form
spells.description: Your apparition's dark power blends with your physical body, allowing you to take on terrifying characteristics of creatures that lurk in dark places.

spells.name: Diabolic Edict
spells.description: You issue a diabolic edict, demanding the target perform a particular task and offering rewards for its fulfillment.

spells.name: Dim the Light
spells.description: Trigger You cast a darkness or shadow spell.

spells.name: Dimensional Assault
spells.description: You tumble through space, making a short dimensional hop to better position yourself for an attack.

spells.name: Discomfiting Whispers
spells.description: You are surrounded by an aura of spiteful murmurings that incite bad luck and punish failure.

spells.name: Disguise Magic
spells.description: You alter how an item's or spell's magical aura appears to effects like detect magic.

spells.name: Distracting Decoy
spells.description: You conjure a colorful, fast-moving shape, such as a small bird or other animal that draws your target's eye.

spells.name: Divine Plagues
spells.description: Your deity sends wracking plagues. The target must attempt a Fortitude save. When you Cast the Spell, decide whether the disease inflicts the clumsy, enfeebled, or stupefied condition. Success The target is unaffected. …

spells.name: Diviner's Sight
spells.description: You glimpse into the target's future. Roll a d20; when the target attempts a non-secret saving throw or skill check, it can use the number you rolled instead of rolling, and the spell ends. Alternatively, you can instea…

spells.name: Dizzying Colors
spells.description: You unleash a swirling multitude of colors that overwhelms creatures based on their Will saves.

spells.name: Draconic Barrage
spells.description: You shape energy into a small group of tiny dragons (or other serpentine creatures) that flit around you.

spells.name: Draw Ire
spells.description: You cause mental distress to a creature, goading it to strike back at you.

spells.name: Earth's Bile
spells.description: Your apparition is the will of lava and magma made manifest, the earth's molten blood unleashing devastating bursts of liquid stone and unquenchable fire at your command.

spells.name: Earthworks
spells.description: With a ripple of earth, you raise small barriers from the ground.

spells.name: Echoing Weapon
spells.description: You channel magical energy into the target weapon, and the air around it faintly hums each time you strike a blow, as the impact is absorbed into the weapon.

spells.name: Eject Soul
spells.description: Your touch disrupts the connection between body and soul, possibly forcing the soul out of the body altogether.

spells.name: Elemental Betrayal
spells.description: Your patron uses its superior command of the elements, empowering them to undermine your foe.

spells.name: Elemental Toss
spells.description: With a flick of your wrist, you fling a chunk of your elemental matter at your foe.

spells.name: Elysian Whimsy
spells.description: You overwhelm the target with an unexpected and unpredictable desire if it fails a Will save.

spells.name: Embodiment of Battle
spells.description: Your apparition guides your attacks and imparts its skill to your movements.

spells.name: Empty Inside
spells.description: You inject a sliver of the void into your mind, momentarily remaking it into a bleak and empty place.

spells.name: Endure
spells.description: You invigorate the touched creature's mind and urge it to press on.

spells.name: Enfeeble
spells.description: Sap the target's strength. Fortitude save — on failure enfeebled 1, on critical failure enfeebled 2. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Entreat Spirit
spells.description: You invite a spirit you've bonded with to bolster your mind.

spells.name: Equal Footing
spells.description: You level the field between yourself and another creature, hampering its movements if it's quicker than you.

spells.name: Evolution Surge

spells.description: You bond yourself to a cherished friend, vowing to share their fate for good or for ill.

spells.name: Stumbling Curse
spells.description: With a twist of a finger, you send a creature careening on a haphazard trajectory.

spells.name: Sudden Shift
spells.description: Trigger An enemy misses you with a melee attack. You swiftly move from a dangerous spot and veil yourself. You Step and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed].

spells.name: Summon Animal
spells.description: Conjure a creature from the primal tradition. The creature fights for you, acting on your turn. Duration: sustained up to 1 minute.

heightening.perInterval: The maximum level of creature you can summon increases by 1

spells.name: Summon Construct
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the construct trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Fey
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the fey trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Lesser Servitor
spells.description: While deities jealously guard their most powerful servants from the summoning spells of those who aren't steeped in the faith, this spell allows you to conjure an inhabitant of the Outer Sphere with or without the deity…

spells.name: Summon Plant or Fungus
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the plant or fungus trait and whose level is -1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Undead
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the undead trait and whose level is -1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Sure Strike
spells.description: Roll your next attack twice and take the better result (fortune). Ignores circumstance penalties and concealment flat checks. Immune for 10 minutes after use.

spells.name: Sure Strike
spells.description: The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll it twice and use the better result.

spells.name: Swampcall
spells.description: You call upon the spirits of the soil to twist and churn, transforming the terrain in the targeted area into a sodden mess.

spells.name: Swarmsense
spells.description: You extend your senses through a multitude of crawling and flying creatures.

spells.name: Swear Oath
spells.description: You loudly and firmly state a course of action that you swear to fulfill.

spells.name: Sweet Dream
spells.description: With your soothing words, you lull the target into an enchanting dream.

spells.name: Synchronize
spells.description: You harmlessly place your unique magic sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on your targets.

spells.name: Synchronize Steps
spells.description: You link the minds of two targets, enabling them to move in tandem.

spells.name: Tailwind
spells.description: The wind at your back pushes you to find new horizons.

spells.name: Tempest Surge
spells.description: You surround a foe in a swirling storm of violent winds, roiling clouds, and crackling lightning.

spells.name: Tempest Touch
spells.description: Your touch calls forth a churning mass of icy water that clings to your target, dealing 1d4 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 cold damage.

spells.name: Temporal Distortion
spells.description: You share some of your own temporal distortions with a foe, altering their mind and body unpredictably as they're thrown backward or forward in time.

spells.name: Temporary Tool
spells.description: You conjure a temporary simple tool, such as a shovel or rope into your hands.

spells.name: Tentacular Limbs
spells.description: Your arms turn into long, pliable tentacles, increasing your reach when you're delivering touch range spells and making unarmed Strikes with your arms (such as fist and claw Strikes) to 10 feet.

spells.name: Tether
spells.description: You use magical chains, vines, or other tethers to bind your target to you.

spells.name: Thicket of Knives
spells.description: You create numerous phantom copies of your weapon arm, hiding your true movements and rendering your attacks unpredictable.

spells.name: Thoughtful Gift
spells.description: You teleport one object of light or negligible Bulk held in your hand to the target.

spells.name: Threefold Limb
spells.description: You temporarily transform one of your limbs into water, taking the form of ice, liquid water, or steam as you desire.

spells.name: Thunderous Strike
spells.description: You swing your massive weapon, creating a wave of sonic vibrations that topples creatures.

spells.name: Thunderstrike
spells.description: Lightning and thunder crack down upon your target. Reflex basic save dealing electricity damage. On a failure, the target is also deafened for 1 round.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d12 for each rank above 1st

spells.name: Tidal Surge
spells.description: You call forth a tremendous wave to move the target either in a body of water or on the ground.

spells.name: Touch of Obedience
spells.description: Your imperious touch erodes the target's willpower, making it easier to control.

spells.name: Touch of the Void
spells.description: You infuse the target with void energy, healing undead or damaging a living creature.

spells.name: Touch of Undeath
spells.description: You attack the target's life force with undeath, dealing 1d6 void damage.

spells.name: Traveling Workshop
spells.description: Your apparition guides you through complex procedures while using your magic to provide you with whatever tools you need.

spells.name: Trickster's Mirrors
spells.description: You are surrounded by up to 3 mirrors that reflect twisted and distorted images of you, making it hard to tell where you actually are within your space and potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the mirr…

spells.name: Turbulent Tide
spells.description: You cause the sheath of water and the improvised weapon it surrounds to surge outward with stupendous force as you attack.

spells.name: Ulcerous Canker
spells.description: Weeping sores open on the target as you expose it to decay, dealing 1d4 void damage and 1d4 poison damage plus @Damage[(2*ceil(@item.rank/2)-1)[bleed]] damage.

spells.name: Unbroken Panoply
spells.description: As tools of violence undone by violence, broken weapons contain potent symbolic magic that faydhaans often call upon when forming alliances.

spells.name: Undeath's Blessing
spells.description: You instill within a creature the touch of the grave.

spells.name: Unexpected Windfall
spells.description: Coins, trinkets carved from heavy stone, and other cumbersome treasures rain down upon a foe.

spells.name: Unfetter Eidolon
spells.description: You loosen the link between yourself and your eidolon, allowing it to travel farther from you for a short period of time.

spells.name: Unimpeded Stride
spells.description: Divine grace ensure that nothing can keep you prisoner or hold you back.

spells.name: Unraveling Blast
spells.description: You unleash a small blast of potential that destroys one of a creature's possible futures, leaving them reeling.

spells.name: Untamed Form
spells.description: You reach within for a different part of yourself, and you set it free, transforming your body into another form.

spells.name: Untamed Shift
spells.description: You transform just a part of your body. Choose any one effect that matches an untamed order feat you have. Untamed Form Your hands transform into incredibly sharp claws. Untamed claws are an unarmed attack, have the agi…

spells.name: Updraft
spells.description: A powerful blast of wind erupts from the ground, launching the target into the air and sending it crashing back down.

spells.name: Vanishing Tracks
spells.description: You obscure the tracks you leave behind. The DC of checks to Track you gains a +4 status bonus or is equal to your spell DC, whichever results in a higher DC. Heightened (2nd) The duration increases to 8 hours. Heighten…

spells.name: Veil of Confidence
spells.description: You surround yourself in a veil of confidence.

spells.name: Veil of Dreams
spells.description: Your patron draws the target into a drowsy state, causing daydreams and sluggishness.

spells.name: Vengeful Glare
spells.description: Your gaze falls on a creature, filled with icy vengeance or fiery wrath.

spells.name: Ventriloquism
spells.description: Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize.

spells.name: Verdant Sprout
spells.description: You imbue a single ordinary, inexpensive plant seed with primal energy and throw it onto a surface, where it gradually sprouts into a Medium plant.

spells.name: Verminous Lure
spells.description: Upon casting, the target emits a musk that's captivating to certain animals.

spells.name: Vibrant Thorns
spells.description: Your body sprouts a coat of brambly thorns that thrive on life magic.

spells.name: Victory Cry
spells.description: Trigger An ally within range critically succeeds at a melee Strike.

spells.name: Vindicator's Mark
spells.description: You launch a magical dart at your hunted prey, which marks them with a nimbus only you can detect.

spells.name: Waking Nightmare
spells.description: You fill the creature's mind with a terrifying vision.

spells.name: Wall of Shrubs
spells.description: You call forth a line of bushes native to the region to spring from the ground.

spells.name: Warped Terrain
spells.description: You create illusory hazards that cover all surfaces in the area (typically the ground).

spells.name: Weaken Earth
spells.description: You weaken the bonds that hold earth and stone together.

spells.name: Weapon Surge
spells.description: Holding your weapon aloft, you fill it with divine energy.

spells.name: Weapon Trance
spells.description: The serenity of violence fills your mind, giving you a heightened sense of knowing exactly where your weapons need to be.

spells.name: Weave Wood
spells.description: With a touch, you cause the target to break into fibrous strands that then weave themselves into a woven mundane object of the same Bulk or less, such as a basket, hat, shield, or mat.

spells.name: Whispering Quiet
spells.description: You suppress sound in an area, preventing anyone from giving away valuable secrets.

spells.name: Wildfire
spells.description: A thin layer of ash and flame covers the ground in the area.

spells.name: Winter Bolt
spells.description: You fling a hollow icicle filled with winter's wrath.

spells.name: Withering Grasp
spells.description: Your touch rots organic material and decays objects.

spells.name: Wooden Fists
spells.description: Your arms and hands swell with new growth, transforming into tree trunks twice as big as their current size.

spells.name: Word of Truth
spells.description: You speak a statement you believe to be true and that is free of any attempt to deceive through twisting words, omission, and so on.

spells.name: Zenith Star
spells.description: You call a tiny star to orbit a creature in a sparkling halo before shooting up into the heavens, where it marks the creature's rough location.

spells.name: Acid Arrow
spells.description: You conjure an arrow of acid that keeps corroding the target after it hits.

spells.name: Acid Grip
spells.description: Conjure a glob of acid that clings to a target and eats away at them. Spell attack dealing acid damage plus persistent acid damage. Sustained to deal damage each round.

heightening.perInterval: The initial and persistent damage increase by 2d6 for every 2 ranks above 2nd

spells.name: Advanced Scurvy
spells.description: Your touch afflicts the target with an advanced form of scurvy, a mariner's disease stemming from improper nutrition.

spells.name: Albatross Curse
spells.description: You create a spectral albatross, a guiding bird for sailors, to hover around the target.

spells.name: Allfood
spells.description: You transform one object into an edible substance that any living creature can chew, swallow, and safely digest.

spells.name: Animal Feature
spells.description: Without fully transforming your body, you gain one animalistic feature, which you select from the list below each time you Cast the Spell.

spells.name: Animal Form
spells.description: Transform into a Medium animal (ape, bear, bull, canine, cat, deer, frog, shark, or snake). Gain temporary HP, special attacks, and AC. Duration 1 minute.

fixedLevels.3: You transform into a Large animal
fixedLevels.5: You transform into a Huge animal

spells.name: Animal Messenger
spells.description: You offer food, and an ordinary Tiny animal within range approaches to eat it.

spells.name: Animated Assault
spells.description: You use your mind to manipulate unattended objects in the area, temporarily animating them to attack.

spells.name: Animus Mine
spells.description: You implant a mental mine within your psyche that detonates against anyone attempting to magically manipulate your thoughts.

spells.name: Ash Cloud
spells.description: You summon a tumultuous cloud of ash and smoke.

spells.name: Augury
spells.description: You gain a vague glimpse of the future. During the casting of this spell, ask about the results of a particular course of action. The spell can predict results up to 30 minutes into the future and reveal the GM's best g…

spells.name: Avenging Wildwood
spells.description: A Medium tree sprouts in an unoccupied square within range, its branches capable of striking out at your foes.

spells.name: Banishing Touch
spells.description: Your touch projects a surge of magic that launches your target safely away.

spells.name: Bee-Man's Summons
spells.description: You recreate the Bee-Man's infamous ability to sense when someone utters their name.

spells.name: Befitting Attire
spells.description: You cloak the targets in an illusion, shaping their clothing and worn items into ones suitable for a particular occasion.

spells.name: Binding Muzzle
spells.description: A shimmering muzzle of pure magical force clamps the target's mouth shut.

spells.name: Blast of the Bellows
spells.description: You create a churning eddy of warm air that makes it difficult to fly within the area.

spells.name: Blazing Armory
spells.description: As long as you have magic, you're never unarmed.

spells.name: Blazing Blade
spells.description: A scimitar-shaped beam of fiery light springs from your free hand.

spells.name: Blazing Bolt
spells.description: You fire a ray of heat and flame. Make a spell attack roll against a single creature. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage, and on a critical hit, the target takes double damage. For each additional action you use…

spells.name: Blistering Invective
spells.description: A heap of insults and invectives spew from your mouth-words so devastating your foes burn from the intensity of your diatribe.

spells.name: Blood Duplicate
spells.description: This spell deals you 1 piercing damage as you shape a magical duplicate of the target from your blood; you can't cast this spell if you don't have blood.

spells.name: Blood Vendetta
spells.description: Reaction when you take damage. You cause the creature that hurt you to take persistent bleed damage equal to the level of the spell.

spells.name: Blur
spells.description: The target's form becomes blurry. It becomes concealed. Attacks against it have a flat DC 5 check to avoid missing. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Bone Spray
spells.description: You fire a torrent of jagged bone shards from your hands, dealing 2d10 piercing damage and 1 persistent bleed damage to all creatures in the area.

spells.name: Boneshaker
spells.description: You reach out a hand and seize a creature's skeleton from afar, harming their body and potentially wrenching them by the bones to move them against their will.

spells.name: Bralani Referendum
spells.description: You enforce fair play with punishing zephyrs.

spells.name: Brand the Impenitent
spells.description: You brand the target with an ethereal copy of your deity's religious symbol.

spells.name: Breath of Drought
spells.description: You fill the area with an oppressive, arid swelter that overwhelms creatures with heat exhaustion.

spells.name: Brine Dragon Bile
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range takes damage from a slashing or piercing attack, or one that inflicts persistent bleed damage.

spells.name: Burrow Ward
spells.description: You solidify the earth around you, hindering burrowing creatures.

spells.name: Buzzing Servants
spells.description: You summon a swarm of bees from the city of Axis that rapidly constructs geometric shapes from wax.

spells.name: Calm
spells.description: You forcibly calm creatures in the area, soothing them into a nonviolent state; each creature must attempt a Will save.

spells.name: Calm Emotions
spells.description: Suppress strong emotions in a 10-foot burst. Will save. Removes hostile actions and emotion effects on failure. Sustained.

spells.name: Canopy Crawler
spells.description: The target grows a prehensile tail, or gains prehensile qualities in their existing tail, to help them climb with ease.

spells.name: Carrion Mire
spells.description: The ground opens into a seemingly endless mass of corpse limbs, grasping at all creatures within the area to drag them down.

spells.name: Cauterize Wounds
spells.description: You seal bleeding wounds with fire. Any target that has persistent bleed damage can choose to take @Damage[1[fire]|immutable:true] damage. If it does, it can attempt to recover from its persistent bleed damage, with the…

spells.name: Charitable Urge
spells.description: You speak on the virtue of charity, compelling the target to give away its possessions.

spells.name: Clad In Metal
spells.description: You briefly swap the outer surface of the metal in an object with a suitable amount of a common precious metal from the Plane of Metal.

spells.name: Claws of the Otter
spells.description: Webbing grows between your fingers and your nails extend into vicious claws.

spells.name: Clawsong
spells.description: You sing a fierce prayer, low and growling, and awaken the ancient spirit of a Terwa beast to guide and strengthen the target's unarmed blows.

spells.name: Cleanse Affliction
spells.description: Gentle restorative magic pushes back the effects of toxins and more complex maladies.

spells.name: Cleanse Air
spells.description: You purify the air in the area, making it clean and breathable.

spells.name: Clear Mind
spells.description: You drive mental contamination from the target's mind.

spells.name: Coiling Dance
spells.description: You perform a dance that seeks to pass on the knowledge and wisdom of a naga.

spells.name: Confetti Cloud
spells.description: You conjure a dense storm of swirling confetti.

spells.name: Create Food
spells.description: You create enough food to feed six Medium creatures for a day.

spells.name: Cutting Insult
spells.description: You utter an insult so offensive that it cuts your target to the quick.

spells.name: Dancing Shield
spells.description: You levitate the touched shield and send it to orbit around a creature.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.description: You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.description: Grant the target darkvision (see perfectly in darkness). Duration 1 hour.

spells.name: Deafness
spells.description: The target loses hearing; it must attempt a Fortitude save.

spells.name: Death Knell
spells.description: You snuff the life out of a creature on the brink of death.

spells.name: Dismantle
spells.description: You touch an object, and it immediately disassembles itself into its component pieces.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.description: You attempt to counteract one spell effect on a target. Make a counteract check against the target spell.

spells.name: Elemental Zone
spells.description: Select an elemental trait: air, earth, fire, metal, water, or wood.

spells.name: Embed Message
spells.description: You specify a trigger and a message up to 25 words long.

spells.name: Empathic Link
spells.description: You forge a bond between yourself and the target, enabling you to feel each other's emotions.

spells.name: Empty Pack
spells.description: You render every item inside the container you touch @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible], although the container itself remains visible.

spells.name: Enhance Victuals
spells.description: You transform the target into delicious fare, changing water into wine or another fine beverage or enhancing the food's taste and ingredients to make it a gourmet treat.

spells.name: Enlarge
spells.description: The target grows to Large size. +2 status bonus to melee damage, 10-foot reach, clumsy 1. Duration 5 minutes.

spells.name: Enlarge Companion
spells.description: Your animal companion grows much larger, towering over its foes in battle.

spells.name: Entangling Flora
spells.description: Plants and fungi burst out or quickly grow, entangling creatures.

spells.name: Environmental Endurance
spells.description: You shield the target against dangerous temperatures.

spells.name: Erase Trail
spells.description: You drastically reduce all signs of one specific creature's passage from the area, including footprints, handprints, dirt, and minor changes caused to the surrounding environment, like the bending of grass.

spells.name: Everlight
spells.description: The gemstone you touch glows, spreading bright light with a color of your choice in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet).

spells.name: Expeditious Excavation
spells.description: Area (continued) cube of dirt 5 feet across or smaller You remove loose dirt, dust, gravel, sand, and the like (though not solid stone) up to the size of a 5-foot cube.

spells.name: Exploding Earth
spells.description: You throw a hard-packed ball of earth and stone at a creature, and the projectile explodes upon impact.

spells.name: Extract Poison
spells.description: With the lightest touch, you can siphon the poison from an object and save it for your own later use, making an assassin's blade or politician's wine less deadly while you become all the more so.

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.description: Cover creatures in a 10-foot burst with colorful light. They can't be concealed or invisible. Reflex save negates. Duration 5 minutes.

spells.name: False Vitality
spells.description: Bolster yourself with magical energy, gaining 6 temporary Hit Points. Duration 8 hours.

heightening.perInterval: The temporary HP increase by 3 for each rank above 2nd

spells.name: False Vitality
spells.description: You augment your flesh with the energies typically used to manipulate the undead.

spells.name: Falsify Heat
spells.description: You veil the signs of the fires of vitality, altering the target's apparent body temperature.

spells.name: Far-Flung Fetch
spells.description: You can pilfer an object even if it's outside the reach of your fingers.

spells.name: Fear the Sun
spells.description: You cause the creature's vision to become particularly sensitive.

spells.name: Feast of Ashes
spells.description: You curse the target with a hunger no food can sate.

spells.name: Feral Shades
spells.description: A wave of gray mist formed of void energy spills out from your outstretched hand, briefly taking the shape of a pack of predatory animals that set viciously on your foes.

spells.name: Final Sacrifice
spells.description: You channel disruptive energies through the bond between you and your minion, causing it to violently explode.

spells.name: Fireproof
spells.description: You prevent the target item from conducting heat or catching fire for the spell's duration.

spells.name: Flame Wisp
spells.description: Small wisps of flame orbit your body. When a creature hits you with a melee attack, it takes 1d4 fire damage. You can also send a wisp at a foe as a free action. Duration 1 minute.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for every 2 ranks above 2nd

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.description: Create a sphere of flame that deals fire damage. Reflex basic save. Sustained: move sphere 10 feet and deal damage again.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d6 for each rank above 2nd

spells.name: Floating Flame
spells.description: You create a fire that burns without fuel and moves to your commands.

spells.name: Frog Tongue
spells.description: Your tongue extends unnaturally, flicking out toward a creature within range and dealing 2d8 bludgeoning damage (basic Reflex save).

spells.name: Fungal Hyphae
spells.description: Thin hyphae grow from your feet and plunge into the earth, creating a symbiotic fungal network that attaches to plants within 30 feet and connects you to their root systems.

spells.name: Fungal Infestation
spells.description: Toxic spores swarm over creatures in the area, causing them to erupt in grotesque fungal growths.

spells.name: Gecko Grip
spells.description: Tiny clinging hairs sprout across the creature's hands and feet, offering purchase on nearly any surface.

spells.name: Gentle Breeze
spells.description: A light, soothing breeze flows through the area, making it easier to rest and recover.

spells.name: Ghostly Carrier
spells.description: You create a Tiny, semi-corporeal figure with a form you choose.

spells.name: Ghoulish Cravings
spells.description: You touch the target to afflict it with the overwhelming desire to eat raw meat.

spells.name: Grave Impressions
spells.description: You project a fragment of your senses into the corpse.

spells.name: Guiding Star
spells.description: You call on the constellations of the night sky to guide a creature to the location where you Cast the Spell.

spells.name: Harmonize Self
spells.description: You heal yourself in one of the following ways, chosen by you when you cast the spell.

spells.name: Heat Metal
spells.description: This spell heats the targeted metal to become red-hot for a moment.

spells.name: Helpful Reload
spells.description: Trigger One of your allies makes a ranged Strike with a weapon with a reload of 1 or less Requirements Your ally has more ammunition for their ranged weapon available.

spells.name: Helpful Wood Spirits
spells.description: Upon casting this spell, a cluster of little wood spirits tumbles into the area.

spells.name: Hidebound
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range is hit with a Strike that deals physical damage.

spells.name: Horrifying Blood Loss
spells.description: You curse the target, filling it with terror at the loss of its blood.

spells.name: Humanoid Form
spells.description: Transform into a Small or Medium humanoid. Duration 10 minutes.

spells.name: Hunter's Luck
spells.description: Trigger You attempt a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Recall Knowledge] about a creature, but you haven't rolled yet.

spells.name: Ignite Fireworks
spells.description: A brilliant and clamorous display of sparks and colorful fireworks explode around your enemies, dealing 1d8 fire damage and 1d8 sonic damage to creatures within a 10-foot burst.

spells.name: Illusory Creature
spells.description: You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature.

spells.name: Illusory Shroud
spells.description: You shroud the target in subtle illusions that make it difficult to detect.

spells.name: Imitate Fauna
spells.description: You use your knowledge of nature to pass the target off as a common animal of the same size, representing a species chosen when the spell is cast.

spells.name: Imp Sting
spells.description: You reproduce an imp's evil, poisonous sting, stabbing at an enemy and possibly affecting them with the devil's benumbing venom.

spells.name: Impart Empathy
spells.description: You expand the target's ability to understand social cues that are normally beyond its comprehension.

spells.name: Impeccable Flow
spells.description: You attune yourself to an underlying cosmic order to the world.

spells.name: Inner Radiance Torrent
spells.description: A 60-foot line of burning light deals fire and spirit damage. Reflex basic save. Undead take extra damage.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d4 for each rank above 2nd

spells.name: Instant Armor
spells.description: Upon casting this spell, the armor you're wearing is whisked away into an extradimensional space that's linked to you.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.description: The target becomes invisible. Ends immediately when the target uses a hostile action. Duration 10 minutes.

fixedLevels.4: Duration 1 minute even if the target uses hostile actions

spells.name: Invoke the Crimson Oath
spells.description: Brandishing your weapon and shouting the final line of the Crimson Oath, you unleash a blast of destructive ruby energy.

spells.name: Iron Gut
spells.description: Your mouth, esophagus, and stomach become incredibly elastic and tougher than metal.

spells.name: Kgalaserke's Axes
spells.description: The folklore and tales surrounding the legendary hero Kgalaserke are so widespread and well known that a hundred lifetimes would not be enough to have accomplished everything she is reputed to have done.

spells.name: Knock
spells.description: You make the target easier to open. Knock grants a +4 status bonus to any creature that tries to open the target door, lock, or container with an Athletics or a Thievery check. You can attempt a Thievery check to open t…

spells.name: Laughing Fit
spells.description: The target is overcome with uncontrollable laughter. Will save — on failure off-guard and can't use reactions. On critical failure also slowed 1. Sustained up to 1 minute.

spells.name: Lifelink Surge
spells.description: You make a quick gesture, tracing the link between yourself and your eidolon and drawing on your connection to slowly strengthen your shared life force.

spells.name: Light of Revelation
spells.description: You shed a luminous aura, illuminating a 30-foot radius with bright light.

spells.name: Lock Item
spells.description: One object held by a creature becomes fused to that creature's hand and can't be put down.

spells.name: Loose Time's Arrow
spells.description: You pluck the time stream like a bow—pull one string back, release, and watch a creature fly.

spells.name: Lucky Number
spells.description: When you Cast this Spell, roll 1d20 and make a note of the result.

spells.name: Luminous Stardust Healing
spells.description: You scatter twinkling sparks from your sentinel weapon, replenishing your allies' fighting spirit and driving out evil.

spells.name: Magic Warrior Aspect
spells.description: You call upon the aspect of the animal from your mask, gaining physical features reminiscent of that animal.

spells.name: Magic Warrior Transformation
spells.description: You transform into the animal from your mask.

spells.name: Magnetic Attraction
spells.description: You adjust your magnetic polarity, plucking daggers from hands and coins from belts.

spells.name: Magnetic Repulsion
spells.description: You adjust your magnetic polarity, causing metal objects to jump and shudder away from you.

spells.name: Manifestation of Spirits
spells.description: You open the target's eyes to the plethora of spirits surrounding it—and it sees all these spirits as menacing and powerful.

spells.name: Mark of Blood
spells.description: You place a drop of your blood on a weapon and charge it with magic so that you transfer a small amount of your life essence with your attack.

spells.name: Marvelous Mount
spells.description: You conjure a Large fantastical creature to serve as a mount for the target.

spells.name: Menacing Lament
spells.description: You wail a dirge for your enemies. Enemies in the area are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Off-Guard] against your attacks and gain no benefits from flanking you for the duration.

spells.name: Mental Map
spells.description: You glean detailed information about a specific place visited by a creature directly from its mind, unless it fends you off with a Will save.

spells.name: Mimic Undead
spells.description: You take death and wrap it about you like a cloak-your colors wash out and your skin grows cold to the touch.

spells.name: Mind Games
spells.description: You lock minds with the target, trying to mentally subdue them.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.description: Three illusory duplicates appear around you. When targeted by an attack, roll 1d4: 1-3 hits a duplicate. Each duplicate vanishes after being hit. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Mist
spells.description: You call forth a cloud of mist. All creatures within the mist become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed], and all creatures outside the mist become concealed to creatures within it. You can Dismiss the …

spells.name: Noise Blast
spells.description: A cacophonous noise blasts out, dealing 2d10 sonic damage.

spells.name: Oaken Resilience
spells.description: The target's skin becomes tough, with a consistency like bark or wood.

spells.name: One with Plants
spells.description: You can either transform into a plant or merge with plant matter.

spells.name: Osseous Cage
spells.description: You conjure a prison made of bone. Creatures in the space where you create the cage can attempt a Reflex save; if they fail or don't attempt the save, they're trapped within it. The spell automatically fails if the spac…

spells.name: Pack Attack
spells.description: You and one other target gain an uncanny coordination that helps you take down foes.

spells.name: Paranoia
spells.description: The target believes everyone is out to get it. Will save — on failure the target treats all creatures as enemies and can't benefit from flanking. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Pave Ground
spells.description: You even out the ground and push aside low obstacles.

spells.name: Peaceful Rest
spells.description: The targeted corpse doesn't decay, nor can it be transformed into an undead.

spells.name: Penumbral Disguise
spells.description: You wrap the target in shadows, granting it a +1 status bonus to Stealth checks to Hide while in dim light or darkness.

spells.name: Perfect Strike
spells.description: Trigger You miss a Strike with an unarmed attack. You call upon insight from your training to recover accuracy. Reroll the missed attack roll and keep the new result.

spells.name: Persistent Servant
spells.description: You call forth an unseen servant and task it to perform a specific chore repeatedly.

spells.name: Phantasmal Treasure
spells.description: A phantasmal image of the most precious thing imaginable to the target appears in a location of your choice within the spell's range.

spells.name: Phantom Crowd
spells.description: A tightly packed crowd of humanoids appropriate to the area appear, facing you and agreeing loudly with anything you say.

spells.name: Propulsive Breeze
spells.description: Trigger An ally in range Strides or Leaps.

spells.name: Pyrefowl Rebuke
spells.description: Trigger A creature within 10 feet of you Strikes and deals damage to you.

spells.name: Quench
spells.description: You cause the air in the area to become supersaturated with water vapor.

spells.name: Radiant Field
spells.description: You create an area of bright light. Creatures with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Light Blindness] that are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] by radiant field and remain in the…

spells.name: Rapid Adaptation
spells.description: You flood the target with energy from the terrain around it, compressing centuries of evolution into a single moment.

spells.name: Reaper's Lantern
spells.description: You call forth a ghostly lantern that guides the living toward death and the undead toward true death.

spells.name: Resist Energy
spells.description: A shield of elemental energy protects a creature, granting resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage. Duration 10 minutes.

fixedLevels.7: Resistance increases to 15, can target up to 5 creatures

spells.name: Restoration
spells.description: Remove a debilitating condition. Reduce the value of clumsy, enfeebled, or stupefied by 2, or remove drained by 1.

fixedLevels.4: Can also remove a permanent condition like blindness or deafness

spells.name: Revealing Light
spells.description: A wave of magical light washes over the area.

spells.name: Rime Slick
spells.description: You call down a chill wind. When you Cast this Spell, you deal 2d4 cold damage to each creature in the area (basic Reflex save). If a creature in the area critically fails its Reflex save and was standing, it also falls…

spells.name: Rubble Step
spells.description: The target leaves behind a trail of shifting rubble that typically consists of stones, but you could choose another earthen material, such as loose sand or soil.

spells.name: Sea Surge
spells.description: You slap or stomp on a nearby solid or liquid surface, sending a surge of water rushing away from you.

spells.name: See the Unseen
spells.description: You can see invisible creatures and objects as translucent forms. You also see concealed creatures. Duration 10 minutes.

spells.name: See the Unseen
spells.description: Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] creatures and spirits.

spells.name: Shadow Zombie
spells.description: You cast a shadow over the target zombie, briefly turning it into shadowy vapor and controlling its movement.

spells.name: Shape Wood
spells.description: You shape the wood into a rough shape of your choice.

spells.name: Share Life
spells.description: You forge a temporary link between the target's life essence and your own.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.description: A high-frequency sonic attack shatters a nearby object.

spells.name: Shining Starlight Attack
spells.description: Area varies (see below) You brandish your sentinel weapon, summoning the image of your constellation above your head.

spells.name: Shrink
spells.description: You warp space to make a creature smaller.

spells.name: Silence
spells.description: The target makes no sound, preventing them from casting spells with verbal components and gaining a +2 to Stealth. Duration 1 minute.

fixedLevels.4: Can be cast as an area spell creating a 10-foot emanation of silence

spells.name: Slough Skin
spells.description: You continually and harmlessly slough off the top layer of your skin while new skin regenerates immediately, quickly moving damaging substances away from your body.

spells.name: Sonata Span
spells.description: By playing a brief tune on an instrument or in song, you cause the notes of the melody to physically manifest into a shimmering, translucent path.

spells.name: Soothing Mist
spells.description: You call forth a magical mist that envelops a creature.

spells.name: Sound Body
spells.description: You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body.

spells.name: Sound Burst
spells.description: A cacophonous burst of sound in a 10-foot burst. Fortitude save — failure: 2d10 sonic damage. Critical failure: stunned 1.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d10 for each rank above 2nd

spells.name: Speak with Animals
spells.description: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals.

spells.name: Spirit of the Beast
spells.description: You bring out the spirit of another animal that lives within your companion.

spells.name: Spirit Sense
spells.description: You open your mind to the metaphysical, enabling you to sense nearby spirits.

spells.name: Spiritual Armament
spells.description: You create a ghostly, magical echo of one weapon you're wielding or wearing and fling it.

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.description: A weapon of pure force appears and attacks on your behalf. Make a spell attack to deal force damage. Sustained to attack again each round.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d8 for every 2 ranks above 2nd

spells.name: Splinter Volley
spells.description: You launch a volley of splinters at your foes.

spells.name: Spy's Mark
spells.description: By pressing your hand to a wall or other solid immobile surface, you cause the crossed-swords symbol of the Firebrands—or a different symbol of your choosing—to appear on the targeted surface.

spells.name: Status
spells.description: As long as you and the target are on the same plane of existence and both alive, you remain aware of its present state.

spells.name: Steel Fortifications
spells.description: You conjure several metal structures that consist of angled beams attached to one another at a central point, which can help block attacks.

spells.name: Sticky Fire
spells.description: You send a bubble of viscous liquid that sparks into flame.

spells.name: Stupefy
spells.description: You dull the target's mind, depending on its Will save.

spells.name: Sudden Blight
spells.description: You accelerate the processes of decay in the area.

spells.name: Sudden Bolt
spells.description: You call down a small bolt of lightning on the target, dealing 4d12 electricity damage. Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

spells.name: Summon Elemental
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the elemental trait and whose level is 1 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summoner's Precaution
spells.description: You create a buffer in the link between yourself and your eidolon in order to prevent you from falling alongside your bonded ally.

spells.name: Summoner's Visage
spells.description: You transform your eidolon into your identical twin.

spells.name: Sun Blade
spells.description: You fire a ray of burning sunlight from your weapon.

spells.name: Sure Footing
spells.description: You free the target's limbs from ailments that impede mobility.

spells.name: Swallow Light
spells.description: You draw magical light into your open mouth, consuming it and turning its essence into fuel for a gout of life-draining shadows.

spells.name: Teeth to Terror
spells.description: The target believes its teeth are falling out, crawling along its face, stabbing into its body, and cramming themselves down its throat.

spells.name: Telekinetic Maneuver
spells.description: With a rush of telekinetic power, you move a foe or something they carry.

spells.name: The Parrot's Whisper
spells.description: You call forth an echo of the gossiping parrot from the tale of the Witch and the Weaver to whisper the secrets of a creature you can see within range.

spells.name: The Queen's Rainbow
spells.description: You tell the story of the Queen of Bees and her retinue trying to pass through a rainbow on their way to visit the King of Spiders.

spells.name: Thermal Remedy
spells.description: You adjust the delicate levels of bitter ingredients in food and drink to draw out their full restorative and fortifying properties.

spells.name: Thundering Dominance
spells.description: You shroud the target in a powerful predatory aura and amplify its vocalizations.

spells.name: Timely Tutor
spells.description: You serve as an astral connection between your eidolon or familiar and the Akashic Record-a demiplane consisting of a comprehensive psychic library-then turn to the creature for advice.

spells.name: Translate
spells.description: The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell.

spells.name: Tremorsense
spells.description: You become aware of vibrations in the ground around you.

spells.name: Umbral Extraction
spells.description: You prepare to steal spells from your foes, ripping them from the foe's shadow to stow them in an ephemeral pocket in the Shadow Plane.

spells.name: Umbral Mindtheft
spells.description: You prepare to steal a broad field of knowledge from another creature, siphoning it from their mind and storing it in a pocket of the Shadow Plane connected to your own mind.

spells.name: Valiant Anthem
spells.description: You chant a rallying cry to bolster your allies.

spells.name: Veil of Spirits
spells.description: You draw on the essence of spiritual energy surrounding you to manifest a misty veil.

spells.name: Vicious Jealousy
spells.description: The target is overcome by deep jealousy and resentment that twists its mind against other creatures.

spells.name: Vision of Weakness
spells.description: You focus your gaze on a creature and gain a flash of divine insight into its nature.

spells.name: Voice on the Breeze
spells.description: You whisper a secret message or sound into the wind, which carries it to a designated spot.

spells.name: Vomit Swarm
spells.description: You belch forth a swarm of magical vermin.

spells.name: Warping Pull
spells.description: Trigger An effect would deal damage to an ally within range.

spells.name: Warrior's Regret
spells.description: Regret eats away at the target's mind, punishing it for its violence until it ceases its hostility.

spells.name: Water Breathing
spells.description: The targets can breathe underwater. Heightened (3rd) The duration increases to 8 hours. Heightened (4th) The duration increases to until your next daily preparations.

spells.name: Water Walk
spells.description: The target can walk on the surface of water and other liquids without falling through.

spells.name: Waterproof
spells.description: You prevent the target item from taking on water or becoming wet for the duration of the spell.

spells.name: Web
spells.description: Fill a 10-foot burst with sticky webbing. Creatures in the area must attempt a Reflex save or be immobilized. The web is difficult terrain.

spells.name: Worm's Repast
spells.description: Gnawing worms materialize within the flesh of the target creature, dealing 4d6 piercing damage and @Damage[floor(@item.level/2)d6[persistent,piercing]] damage.

spells.name: Aberrant Whispers
spells.description: You utter phrases in an unknown tongue, assaulting the minds of those nearby.

spells.name: Access Lore
spells.description: You sift through the multiverse's divine knowledge, seeking out tidbits related to a particular subject.

spells.name: Agonizing Despair
spells.description: Your target's mind tumbles down a deep well of dread, dwelling so intently on deep-seated fears that it's painful.

spells.name: Ancestral Defense
spells.description: Trigger You are about to attempt a Will save. Your ancestor protects you against those who would bend your will. You roll the triggering save twice and use the better result.

spells.name: Angelic Wings
spells.description: Wings of pure light spread out from your back, granting you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Animal Vision
spells.description: You tap into the target's senses, allowing you to sense whatever it senses for the spell's duration.

spells.name: Annunciation of the Outer Gate
spells.description: You announce yourself in the name of certain grim pacts that predate mortal life.

spells.name: Anointed Ground
spells.description: You sanctify the area, sprinkling it with certain oils and warding it against your foes.

spells.name: Antlion Trap
spells.description: You transmute the ground into a conical pit trap of loose sand that becomes difficult terrain for the duration.

spells.name: Aqueous Orb
spells.description: A sphere of water 10 feet in diameter forms in an unoccupied space in range, either on the ground or on the surface of a liquid.

spells.name: Armor of Bones
spells.description: You ossify your physical form, mimicking the durability of bone.

spells.name: Battlefield Persistence
spells.description: Trigger You are about to attempt a saving throw, but you haven't rolled yet.

spells.name: Beastmaster Trance
spells.description: You enter a magical trance that allows you to perceive through the senses of the target companion.

spells.name: Behold the Weave
spells.description: You behold the many timelines that weave around a creature, and in so doing, you make one more likely to occur.

spells.name: Bind Undead
spells.description: With a word of power, you seize control of the target.

spells.name: Blastback
spells.description: Trigger You fall more than 10 feet. You hit the ground with a shuddering boom, propelling the force of your fall out in a wave. You take no damage from the fall as the displaced air allows you to land gently, but all ot…

spells.name: Blazing Dive
spells.description: Superheated air collects under you, buoying you high into the sky before you plummet back down in a fiery comet.

spells.name: Blinding Beauty
spells.description: You channel the allure of your nymph bloodline into a terribly beautiful glance.

spells.name: Blindness
spells.description: Blind the target. Fortitude save — on failure the target is blinded. Duration varies by degree of failure.

spells.name: Blister Bomb
spells.description: You launch a small bomb enchanted with a fast-acting skin disease at your foes, causing their skin to break out in horrible bleeding sores.

spells.name: Blood in the Water
spells.description: Requirements The target is taking persistent bleed damage or your last action dealt slashing damage to the target.

spells.name: Bone Flense
