spells.description: The target weapon becomes imbued with Achaekek's power and glows softly with crimson light akin to that shed by a candle.

spells.name: Bonewall Bulwark
spells.description: You create a miniature replica of the infamous Bonewall of Yled, a jumble of bones with threatening limbs reaching from it.

spells.name: Bottomless Stomach
spells.description: You create a shimmering extradimensional space accessible from the target's mouth.

spells.name: Bracing Tendrils
spells.description: Visible tendrils of force anchor your body to the ground, preventing unwanted movement.

spells.name: Burglar's Blind
spells.description: The only thing thieves love more than being silent and stealthy is the piles of gold they win with that silence and stealth.

spells.name: Cascade Countermeasure
spells.description: You quickly adjust your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Arcane Cascade] to offer magical protection.

spells.name: Caster's Imposition
spells.description: A magical interference prevents the target from contributing to any form of cooperative spellcasting.

spells.name: Cave Fangs
spells.description: Sharp flowstone formations protrude from the ground and ceiling, dealing 6d6 piercing damage to creatures in the area with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Censure Falsehoods
spells.description: You call on your patron to reprimand a creature that has attempted a Deception or Stealth check against you or an ally within the past month.

spells.name: Chilling Darkness
spells.description: You shoot an utterly cold ray of darkness tinged with unholy energy.

spells.name: Circle of Protection
spells.description: A 10-foot emanation protects you and allies. +1 status bonus to AC and saves. Creatures trying to enter must succeed at a Will save. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Claim Curse
spells.description: By burning threads of fate around a target and then retying them to yourself instead, you temporarily draw their curse to you and offer them brief succor from the worst of its effects.

spells.name: Clairaudience
spells.description: You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect).

spells.name: Cloud Dragon's Cloak
spells.description: Trigger You or an ally in range is targeted by a ranged attack.

spells.name: Combustion
spells.description: You ignite a creature in lasting flames. The fire deals 4d8 fire damage and @Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]] damage to the creature, which must attempt a Fortitude save. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success…

spells.name: Conjured Conveyance
spells.description: You conjure an intricate vehicle, carved entirely from wood, to serve as a method of conveyance.

spells.name: Consecrate Flesh
spells.description: Through the strength of your faith, your body becomes infused with holy energy.

spells.name: Coral Scourge
spells.description: Barnacles, coral, and other rough aquatic creatures grow on the target's body, getting in between their joints and stiffening their movement.

spells.name: Cordyceps Command
spells.description: You conjure a mote of cordyceps spores uniquely tailored to the target before whisking it at them.

spells.name: Cozy Cabin
spells.description: You shape a cabin 20 feet on each side and 10 feet high.

spells.name: Crashing Wave
spells.description: You summon a crashing wave that sweeps away from you. You deal 6d6 bludgeoning damage to creatures in the area. The water also extinguishes non-magical fires in the area. Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

spells.name: Crisis of Faith
spells.description: You assault the target's faith, riddling the creature with doubt and mental turmoil that deal 6d6 mental damage, or 6d8 mental damage if it can cast divine spells.

spells.name: Croak Voice
spells.description: You cause the target creature's vocal chords to swell like those of a frog.

spells.name: Cup of Dust
spells.description: You curse the target with a thirst no drink can quench.

spells.name: Curse of Lost Time
spells.description: You curse the target with rapid aging or erosion.

spells.name: Cyclone Rondo
spells.description: Playing or singing melodies discovered by the ancient Shory, you call up a whirlwind.

spells.name: Day's Weight
spells.description: You fast-forward time for a single creature, burdening it with the aches and pain of an entire day and making it temporarily tired and weak.

spells.name: Deceiver's Cloak
spells.description: Your patron drapes a cloak of illusion about you, making you appear as another creature of the same body shape with roughly similar height and weight as yourself.

spells.name: Deep Sight
spells.description: Your eyes darken until they become entirely pitch black.

spells.name: Delay Affliction
spells.description: With a surge of healing energy, you push back against an affliction threatening the target and grant a small amount of healing.

spells.name: Disruptive Transfer
spells.description: Using Venorium Blorm's formulas, you calculate a path through space.

spells.name: Distracting Chatter
spells.description: You bombard a target with distracting auditory illusions, surrounding them with a tumultuous cacophony of overlapping speech, whispers, screams, and muttering.

spells.name: Dive and Breach
spells.description: You make the briefest of dives through the Plane of Water.

spells.name: Dividing Trench
spells.description: You dig an earthen trench across the surrounding terrain, which must be soil, clay, sand, or other soft earth, but not flooring or stone.

spells.name: Dragon Breath
spells.description: You spew energy from your mouth, dealing 5d6 damage with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Drain Life
spells.description: You close your hand and pull life energy from another creature into yourself.

spells.name: Dream Message
spells.description: You send a message to your target's dream.

spells.name: Eagle's Cry
spells.description: You let out the mighty cry of a majestic eagle that pierces eardrums.

spells.name: Earthbind
spells.description: Bring a flying creature to the ground. Fortitude save — on failure, the target loses its fly speed and floats to the ground. Duration varies.

spells.name: Echo Jump
spells.description: You teleport to an unoccupied space within range, leaving behind a faint echo of your form that explodes with magical force.

spells.name: Eidolon's Wrath
spells.description: Your eidolon releases a powerful energy attack that deals 5d6 damage of the type you chose when you took the Eidolon's Wrath feat, with a basic Reflex save. Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

spells.name: Electrified Crystal Ward
spells.description: You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.hazards.Actor.Electric Latch Rune] hazard on the target, creating a special crystalline lock on the object.

spells.name: Elemental Absorption
spells.description: You absorb elemental energy, which you can release as a powerful counterattack.

spells.name: Elemental Annihilation Wave
spells.description: You draw elemental power from your surroundings, and combining it with your own magical energy, unleash a wave of utter destruction and swirling colors that deals 1d6 fire damage and 3d6 bludgeoning damage with a basic …

spells.name: Elemental Motion
spells.description: You call upon your element to propel you, improving your Speed depending on your element.

spells.name: Embrace the Pit
spells.description: Devil horns grow from your skull, and your skin takes on features of the devil responsible for your diabolic bloodline.

spells.name: Enthrall
spells.description: Your words fascinate your targets. You speak or sing without interruption throughout the casting and duration. Targets who notice your speech or song might give their undivided attention; each target must attempt a Will…

spells.name: Envenom Companion
spells.description: You envenom your companion or eidolon's attacks, which drip with highly toxic venom for the spell's duration.

spells.name: Ephemeral Tracking
spells.description: You can look at currents in the air and water and see tracks that you can follow just as you would on land.

spells.name: Excise Lexicon
spells.description: You reach into a creature's mind and extract its knowledge of a word.

spells.name: Extend Blood Magic
spells.description: You call upon the arcane energy coursing through your blood to extend the magic it grants.

spells.name: Extend Spell
spells.description: You call upon your blood's knowledge of the ancients to extend your magic.

spells.name: Eyes of the Dead
spells.description: You enter a magical trance that allows you to perceive through the senses of the target creature.

spells.name: Familiar's Face
spells.description: The target becomes a scrying sensor, allowing you to see through its eyes, smell what it smells, and similarly use its other senses.

spells.name: Far Sight
spells.description: You can see distant objects as if they were closer.

spells.name: Fate's Travels
spells.description: You get a vision of the creature when it was alive, and its last 10 minutes of travel.

spells.name: Feet to Fins
spells.description: The target's feet transform into fins, improving mobility in the water but reducing it on land.

spells.name: Fey Disappearance
spells.description: You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] and ignore natural difficult terrain (such as underbrush).

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: Create a devastating explosion in a 20-foot burst

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 3rd

spells.name: Firework Blast
spells.description: You create a massive display of loud and colorful explosions.

spells.name: Focusing Hum
spells.description: You infuse the air around you with a sustained hum that allows creatures within it to resist distractions.

spells.name: Fungal Exhalation
spells.description: You exhale toxic mold spores that fill the area.

spells.name: Gasping Marsh
spells.description: With a rattling hiss, you create a quickly evaporating mist of invisible poisonous marsh gas to smother creatures in the area.

spells.name: Ghostly Weapon
spells.description: The target weapon becomes translucent and ghostly, and it can affect material and incorporeal creatures and objects.

spells.name: Glass Sand
spells.description: You throw a handful of sand that transforms into jagged shards of glass.

spells.name: Gravity Well
spells.description: You create a sphere of altered gravity. All creatures and unsecured objects in the area move towards the center, depending on their Reflex saving throws. This follows the rules for forced movement. If there's not enough…

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Empower target to act faster, granting quickened (extra action for Strike or Stride only). Duration 1 minute.

fixedLevels.7: You can target up to 6 creatures

spells.name: Heart's Desire
spells.description: You surround your target with wondrous illusions of their greatest desires, which distract them from reality.

spells.name: Heatvision
spells.description: The target visually senses the heat energy emitted by the creatures and objects around it, gaining infrared vision at a range of 60 feet as a precise sense.

spells.name: Hedge Prison
spells.description: You conjure an intricate hedge prison to trap a creature, encasing them completely in a hollow cube of dense bushes.

spells.name: Heroism
spells.description: Grant +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, saving throws, and skill checks. Duration 10 minutes.

spells.name: Holy Light
spells.description: A beam of holy light scorches the target. Spell attack dealing fire damage. Extra damage against fiends and undead.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 3rd

spells.name: Holy Light
spells.description: You shine a blazing ray of light tinged with holy energy.

spells.name: Horde of Underlings
spells.description: You summon six underlings, such as skeletons or kobolds.

spells.name: Horrific Visage
spells.description: You briefly transform your features into the horrific visage of a hag, striking fear into your enemies.

spells.name: Hypercognition
spells.description: You rapidly catalog and collate information relevant to your current situation.

spells.name: Hypnotize
spells.description: You create a cloud of mesmerizing patterns and colors that hovers in the air.

spells.name: Ibex's Harvest
spells.description: In the tale "Ibex's Harvest," Ibex turns from the path of a warrior to the path of a farmer, building up their community by working hard and sharing a bountiful harvest not just with their humanoid neighbors but also wi…

spells.name: Impending Doom
spells.description: You sift through myriad potential futures, seize upon one potential moment in which the target meets a particularly gruesome and fatal end, and then show it a vision of its impending demise.

spells.name: Incendiary Ashes
spells.description: A cloud of magical ashes descends upon creatures in the area.

spells.name: Infectious Ennui
spells.description: With a wave of your hand and a short invocation, you cause feelings of ennui and impending doom to well up in the mind of the targeted creature, who must attempt a Will save.

spells.name: Inscrutable Mask
spells.description: You shroud your form and features in an impenetrable mask of shadow.

spells.name: Insect Form
spells.description: You envision a simple bug and transform into a Medium animal battle form.

spells.name: Instant Parade
spells.description: An illusory parade with dozens of participants and performers appears around you, following you as you move.

spells.name: Interstellar Void
spells.description: You call upon the frigid depths of outer space to bring a terrible chill to your enemy.

spells.name: Invoke the Harrow
spells.description: You draw a card from the harrow, either one from a deck you have in hand or magically produce one as part of the spell.

spells.name: Ki Cutting Sight
spells.description: Ki flows through everything in existence—animals and plants, living and dead, mortals and spirits.

spells.name: Lashing Rope
spells.description: You cause a section of rope or a rope-like object to animate, slither to your square, and encircle you, wreathing you in twisting, lashing fibers.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.description: Float in the air. Rise or descend 10 feet per round. Duration 5 minutes.

spells.name: Life Connection
spells.description: When you cast this spell, you place a failsafe deep within the life force of the target.

spells.name: Life Pact
spells.description: Using your life force or spirit as a conduit, you bind the targets in a mystical pact.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: Unleash a 120-foot line of electricity (Reflex basic save)

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d12 for each rank above 3rd

spells.name: Locate
spells.description: You learn the direction to the target (if you picked a specific object, such as "my mother's sword") or the nearest target (if you picked a type of object, such as "swords").

spells.name: Lotus Walk
spells.description: Lotuses, water lilies, and other watery plants bloom at your feet, allowing you to walk on the surface of water and other liquids.

spells.name: Mad Monkeys
spells.description: Magical monkey spirits fill the area as they pile and climb on top of one another.

spells.name: Magical Fetters
spells.description: Ghostly manacles launch from your outstretched hand and clasp around the target's limbs, impeding its movements.

spells.name: Magnetic Acceleration
spells.description: You magnetize a small metal object, such as a nail or coin, and launch it away from you at massive speed.

spells.name: Malicious Shadow
spells.description: Your patron warps the target's shadow into a deadly form, such as strangling hands, a dangerous weapon, harrying runes, or the like.

spells.name: Martyr's Intervention
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range would take damage that reduces it to 0 Hit Points Requirements You don't have the wounded condition.

spells.name: Mind of Menace
spells.description: This spell wards against those who attempt to subvert your mind and turns mental magic back on them.

spells.name: Mind Reading
spells.description: With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind.

spells.name: Moonlight Ray
spells.description: You unleash a holy beam of freezing moonlight.

spells.name: Moth's Supper
spells.description: You sigh, and your breath transforms into delicate, black-winged butterflies and huge death's-head hawkmoths.

spells.name: Mycological Malady
spells.description: You infect your target with fungal spores to hasten the cycle of decay.

spells.name: Neutralize Poison
spells.description: Attempt to remove a poison afflicting the target. Make a counteract check against the poison.

spells.name: Nothing Up My Sleeve
spells.description: You create an extradimensional space within each of your sleeves.

spells.name: Noxious Metals
spells.description: This spell forces toxic metal to coalesce on the skin or surface of all living creatures in the area, dealing 4d6 poison damage with a basic Fortitude save.

spells.name: One with Stone
spells.description: You can either transform into a stone or merge with stone.

spells.name: Oneiric Mire
spells.description: You shroud an area in illusory dreamstuff, making the ground look and feel like a deep mire or quicksand.

spells.name: Ooze Form
spells.description: You invoke all things that seep and ooze, your body dissolving into a thick slurry and then reconstituting itself into a Medium ooze battle form.

spells.name: Organsight
spells.description: You see the target as though it's dissected and arrayed before you.

spells.name: Overwhelming Memory
spells.description: You cause the target to recall a specific type of memory you choose from the list below, bringing it to the forefront of their mind with perfect clarity.

spells.name: Painted Scout
spells.description: You press your hand to the stone, causing hand-drawn scouts to spread out from your fingers.

spells.name: Paralyze
spells.description: The target's body becomes rigid. Will save — on failure paralyzed for 1 round, on critical failure paralyzed for 4 rounds.

fixedLevels.7: You can target up to 10 creatures

spells.name: Perceive the Threads of Fate
spells.description: You open your mind to the grand design of existence, enabling you to view the threads of fate in all their complex, tangled glory.

spells.name: Percussive Impact
spells.description: You lob a compressed ball of sound at a foe.

spells.name: Perseis's Precautions
spells.description: Leaving nothing to chance, you weave divinatory precautions against an ambush, alerting the target to danger.

spells.name: Personal Blizzard
spells.description: Your patron's breath becomes blizzard of obscuring, scouring ice that follows your target.

spells.name: Phantom Prison
spells.description: You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in immobile illusory walls, trapping it inside a false prison it can't escape.

spells.name: Pillar of Water
spells.description: You create a large, self-contained cylinder of still, clear fresh water.

spells.name: Positive Attunement
spells.description: You attune a creature to the Forge of Creation, connecting its life force without fully transporting it.

spells.name: Powerful Inhalation
spells.description: You rapidly draw the air from your surroundings, hoarding it for yourself.

spells.name: Primal Chorus
spells.description: You let loose a primal howl that incites animals and beasts to join in the chorus.

spells.name: Pulverizing Cascade
spells.description: You raise a pair of towering waves and slam them into each other, crushing creatures caught between them.

spells.name: Purging Toxins
spells.description: In the right dose, a scourge can become a cure.

spells.name: Pyrotechnics
spells.description: You turn a fire into either a burst of blinding fireworks or a thick cloud of choking smoke, chosen when you Cast the Spell.

spells.name: Qi Blast
spells.description: You unleash your qi as a powerful blast that deals 2d6 force damage.

spells.name: Radiant Globe
spells.description: You create a dome of brilliant light that destroys projectiles attempting to pass through it.

spells.name: Rally Point
spells.description: You mark the area touched as a rally point.

spells.name: Ranger's Bramble
spells.description: You cause plants in the area to entangle your foes, with the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Entangling Flora].

spells.name: Remove Disease
spells.description: Attempt to remove a disease afflicting the target. Make a counteract check against the disease.

spells.name: Return the Favor
spells.description: Trigger An ally uses a reaction to grant you a beneficial effect during a combat encounter.

spells.name: Ring of Truth
spells.description: You designate an area in which lies are revealed.

spells.name: Roaring Applause
spells.description: Your flamboyant flourish invokes such powerful feelings in your audience that you incite cheers and applause.

spells.name: Rouse Skeletons
spells.description: Misshapen skeletal forms erupt from a solid surface, such as a stone floor, and fill the burst.

spells.name: Safe Passage
spells.description: Area 10-foot-wide, 10-foot-tall, 60-foot-long section of terrain You make passage through the area safe for a brief amount of time.

spells.name: Sand Form
spells.description: You grant the target's body and gear aspects of sand.

spells.name: Scrying Ripples
spells.description: You touch the water's surface, and as the ripples spread out, so do your senses.

spells.name: Sculpt Sound
spells.description: You change the sounds made by a creature or object.

spells.name: Sea of Thought
spells.description: You cover the area in a sloshing torrent of semi-solidified thought, roughly ankle high.

spells.name: Secret Page
spells.description: You change the target's text to different text entirely.

spells.name: Shadow Projectile
spells.description: Trigger An ally within 20 feet of you makes a ranged attack roll.

spells.name: Shadow Spy
spells.description: You mix blood, soil, and shadow together to form a half-real homunculus in the shape of a crow, sparrow, or other bird.

spells.name: Shared Invisibility
spells.description: You and all targets are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] except to each other as long as the targets remain within the emanation.

spells.name: Sheltering Wings
spells.description: Trigger An ally moves through a square within 15 feet of you or uses an action that has the move trait.

spells.name: Shift Blame
spells.description: Trigger You or another creature attacks a creature or fails at a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check.

spells.name: Shifting Sand
spells.description: Area (continued) a horizontal earthen or sandy surface within a 20-foot burst You cause the surface to heave.

spells.name: Show the Way
spells.description: You and allies in the area gain preternatural knowledge of the path ahead, allowing you to intuit the best way forward and avoid potential obstacles, such as difficult or confusing terrain.

spells.name: Shrink Item
spells.description: You shrink the target to roughly the size of a coin with negligible Bulk.

spells.name: Shrink the Span
spells.description: You move so fast you blur across planar boundaries. You teleport up to a distance equal to your Speed within your line of sight.

spells.name: Shroud of Flame
spells.description: You encircle yourself in an aura of protective flames.

spells.name: Sign of Conviction
spells.description: You conjure the religious symbol of your deity into the air above you in the same space you stand in, wielding the power of your faith to smite your foes.

spells.name: Slow
spells.description: Dilate time around the target (Fort save: success=slowed 1 for 1 round, failure=slowed 1 for 1 min, crit fail=slowed 2)

fixedLevels.6: You can target up to 10 creatures

spells.name: Soothing Blossoms
spells.description: Blossoms grow from the ground in a small area, soothing away afflictions and persistent pains and harm.

spells.name: Sparkleskin
spells.description: You coat a creature's body in a layer of brilliantly sparkling glitter.

spells.name: Speak with Plants
spells.description: You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants and fungi, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal.

spells.name: Spirit Veil
spells.description: You draw an occluding veil of spirits around yourself, blocking yourself especially well from undead eyes.

spells.name: Steal Shadow
spells.description: You steal a creature's shadow, leaving it weakened and vulnerable.

spells.name: Stinking Cloud
spells.description: Create a 20-foot burst of noxious fumes. Creatures in the area must attempt Fortitude saves each turn or become sickened. Conceals creatures within.

spells.name: Stone Lance
spells.description: You conjure a jagged lance of stone and then launch it at a foe.

spells.name: Strength of Mind
spells.description: You bolster your ally with reminders of their physical prowess, granting them additional defenses against harmful mental effects.

spells.name: Subjugate Undead
spells.description: You attempt to seize control of the target.

spells.name: Sudden Recollection
spells.description: You place a bit of knowledge deep in a creature's subconscious or make a willing creature forget some information until a specific trigger occurs.

spells.name: Sun's Fury
spells.description: The target weapon becomes wreathed in a glowing flame.

spells.name: Swamp of Sloth
spells.description: Ground in the area turns swampy and fetid.

spells.name: Tempest Cloak
spells.description: You shroud one creature in a cloak of fierce, howling winds, shielding it from attacks and making it difficult to approach.

spells.name: Temporal Twin
spells.description: You pull a fleeting duplicate of your ally from the recent past.

spells.name: The Four Hunters
spells.description: This is a story of four evenly matched hunters who sought to capture a falling star.

spells.name: Thief of Fortune
spells.description: Seeing another creature improve themself with magic, you reach out and seize its benefits for yourself.

spells.name: Threatening Mimicry
spells.description: You appear larger and stronger to nearby creatures, appearing to possess threatening features like antlers, claws, or poison to their senses.

spells.name: Threefold Aspect
spells.description: This spell allows you to change between three versions of yourself of different ages: a maiden (young adult), a mother (adult), or a matriarch (elderly).

spells.name: Thunderburst
spells.description: You create a powerful blast of air and a loud peal of thunder, dealing 2d6 bludgeoning damage and 2d6 sonic damage.

spells.name: Time Jump
spells.description: You leap forward a few seconds in time, appearing across the battlefield in the blink of an eye.

spells.name: Time Pocket
spells.description: You fling the target item forward in time and link it to the future of the creature holding it.

spells.name: Time Skip
spells.description: You manipulate time around your ally, pushing them forward a few moments in time.

spells.name: Trade Items
spells.description: You magically swap an item you're holding for another that someone else has.

spells.name: Transcribe Conflict
spells.description: You cause a sheet of paper to appear in your hand, and a moment later a detailed description of a combat you experienced within the last hour is recorded on that sheet of paper in a language that you know of your choice.

spells.name: Travel by Turtle
spells.description: You conjure an intelligent sea turtle, who agrees to carry you upon its shell on a water journey.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Revelation
spells.description: You light your foe with revealing flame. The GM attempts a secret counteract check against each illusion affecting the creature; on a success, you suppress the illusion for the duration, rather than end the effect.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Advance
spells.description: You unleash a mighty wave from your hand that buffets back your foes.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Rush
spells.description: You travel on a rushing wind. Move two times: two Strides, two Steps, or one Stride and one Step (in either order). You can Stride or Step into the air during this movement, moving upward at a 45-degree angle at most; i…

spells.name: Unravel Knowledge
spells.description: Your patron reaches into the target's mind, plucking out their past training like pulling a thread from a cloth.

spells.name: Unseasonable Squall
spells.description: You issue a blast of sudden wind that ripples outward from the center of the burst.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Buffer
spells.description: You send currents of protective ki to the surface of your body that protect you from harm, at least until your enemies dissipate them.

spells.name: Vampiric Feast
spells.description: Touch attack that deals void damage and heals you for half the damage dealt.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 3rd

spells.name: Veil of Privacy
spells.description: You erect protective wards that make the target difficult to detect via magic.

spells.name: Wall of Radiance
spells.description: You create a thin wall of brilliant light in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high.

spells.name: Wall of Shadow
spells.description: You form a wall of pure darkness in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high.

spells.name: Wall of Thorns
spells.description: An entangling wall of thorns springs up. 60 feet long, 10 feet high, 5 feet thick. Creatures moving through take piercing damage with Fortitude save. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Wall of Virtue
spells.description: You create a translucent wall of light, which draws power from the celestial realms.

spells.name: Wall of Water
spells.description: Raising your hand in the air, you call a massive wave onto the battlefield.

spells.name: Wall of Wind
spells.description: You create a barrier of gusting winds that hinders anything moving through it.

spells.name: Wanderer's Guide
spells.description: You call upon the beyond to guide your route.

spells.name: Warding Aggression
spells.description: You channel a magical ward through your attack and attempt to plant it on a foe.

spells.name: Warning Stripes
spells.description: Your skin becomes painted with vivid stripes or bright aposematic swirls, warning other creatures of its toxic qualities.

spells.name: Web of Eyes
spells.description: You place an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] scrying sensor on each target just above their eyes.

spells.name: Whirling Flames
spells.description: You call forth a storm of whirling flames, engulfing all creatures in that area and dealing 5d6 fire damage with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Whirling Scarves
spells.description: You surround yourself in a vortex of whirling colorful scarves of force that obfuscate you and disorient your foes.

spells.name: Wings of the Valkyrie
spells.description: Powerful feathered wings—usually vibrant white or jet black—emerge from your back, granting you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Wooden Double
spells.description: Trigger You're critically hit by a damage-dealing effect or a Strike.

spells.name: Achaekek's Clutch
spells.description: You mark the holy symbol of Achaekek in a visible location on the target's body.

spells.name: Adaptive Ablation
spells.description: Trigger You take acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage.

spells.name: Aerial Form
spells.description: Transform into a flying creature (bat, bird, pteranodon, wasp). Gain fly Speed, temporary HP, and special attacks. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Air Walk
spells.description: The target can walk on air as if it were solid ground. It can ascend and descend in this way at a maximum of a 45-degree angle.

spells.name: Airlift
spells.description: A massive rush of wind lifts, briefly carrying you and everything around you to a nearby destination.

spells.name: Anathematic Reprisal
spells.description: Reaction when a creature attacks your ally. The attacker takes mental damage. Will save for half.

spells.name: Aromatic Lure
spells.description: You override a target's olfactory senses, luring them to a specific location through tantalizing false scents.

spells.name: Artistic Flourish
spells.description: You transform the target into a form that more closes matches your creative vision.

spells.name: Asterism
spells.description: Area (continued) five 30-foot lines Lines of burning starlight form a constellation around you.

spells.name: Bestial Curse
spells.description: You tap into the target's inner being and curse it to become a bestial version of itself.

spells.name: Bloodspray Curse
spells.description: You inflict a curse upon the target that causes any wound to gush blood.

spells.name: Bottle the Storm
spells.description: Trigger You would take electricity damage.

spells.name: Bridge of Vines
spells.description: Vines sprout beneath your feet and extend away from you in a straight line up to 60 feet, forming a 10-foot-wide bridge that can cross over difficult terrain and low obstacles, as well as reach higher ground.

spells.name: Bursting Bloom
spells.description: You cause a rose bush to sprout from the chest of a foe, bursting out of its body and wrapping it in thorned vines.

spells.name: Call The Blood
spells.description: With a word and gesture, you cause streams of blood to erupt from the target's mouth, nostrils, ears, or other facial openings and come rushing into your mouth.

spells.name: Call the Ten
spells.description: The Ten Magic Warriors were the first of the Magaambya's students, and they come to your aid even now.

spells.name: Capital Dividend
spells.description: Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

spells.name: Captivating Adoration
spells.description: You become intensely entrancing, and creatures are distracted by you as long as they remain within the area.

spells.name: Channel Arrogance
spells.description: You channel your heightened sense of self-worth into a creature, forcing them to acknowledge your true worth.

spells.name: Chroma Leach
spells.description: Your hand glows with impossible colors from beyond the stars, and your touch saps both color and vitality from the living.

spells.name: Chromatic Armor
spells.description: You wrap the target in armor made of sheets of colored light.

spells.name: Chromatic Ray
spells.description: You send out a ray of colored light streaming toward your enemy, with a magical effect depending on the ray's color.

spells.name: Cinder Swarm
spells.description: You breathe life into a mass of fiery critters.

spells.name: Clairvoyance
spells.description: You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect).

spells.name: Cleanse Affliction
spells.description: Attempt to remove a curse or affliction from the target. Make a counteract check against the curse.

spells.name: Clinging Shadows Stance
spells.description: You adopt the stance of clinging shadows. You can make shadow grasp Strikes. These deal 1d4 void damage; are in the brawling group; and have the agile, grapple, reach, and unarmed traits. While in clinging shadows stanc…

spells.name: Cloak of Light
spells.description: You surround yourself in holy light that restores the living and rebuffs undead.

spells.name: Cloud Current
spells.description: Air and water vapor combine into a great cloud that funnels a powerful current within it.

spells.name: Clownish Curse
spells.description: You afflict the target with a curse that causes it to emit ridiculous noises as it moves.

spells.name: Commanding Lash
spells.description: With the threat of more pain, you compel a creature you've recently harmed.

spells.name: Community Restoration
spells.description: Trigger You Cast a Spell from a wizard spell slot, and the spell affects one or more willing allies without damaging them.

spells.name: Compel True Name
spells.description: You instruct the target to do something, compelling obedience by calling it by its true name.

spells.name: Competitive Edge
spells.description: Your competitiveness drives you to prove yourself against the opposition.

spells.name: Confront Selves
spells.description: You show the target the spiraling web of actions and consequences that is their life and the changes wrought by these decisions upon themselves and those around them.

spells.name: Confusion
spells.description: You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly.

spells.name: Conjured Clockwork
spells.description: You conjure a complex clockwork device on the ground and cause it to slowly spread across the battlefield.

spells.name: Containment
spells.description: You wrap a creature in an immobile force field, whether to protect it or those around it.

spells.name: Coral Eruption
spells.description: Area two 10-foot bursts that don't overlap Razor sharp coral growths erupt from the ground, transforming the landscape into a dangerous coral reef.

spells.name: Countless Eyes
spells.description: Eyes form across the touched creature's body, allowing it to see in all directions at once.

spells.name: Creation
spells.description: You conjure a temporary object from magical energy.

spells.name: Darkened Eyes
spells.description: You infuse a creature's vision with darkness.

spells.name: Darkened Sight
spells.description: You infuse a creature's vision with darkness. It receives greater darkvision, allowing it to see even in magical darkness. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Spell Effect: Darkened Sight]

spells.name: Dawnflower's Light
spells.description: The object glows with soft golden light that lays bare the truth, reveals hidden objects, and shines supernatural light on false orders.

spells.name: Daydreamer's Curse
spells.description: You impose a curse upon the target that renders it easily distracted and unable to focus its thoughts on tasks that demand insight or discernment.

spells.name: Deathless March
spells.description: You chant a marching song of Yled to empower the undead and terrify the living.

spells.name: Debilitating Dichotomy
spells.description: You reveal a glimpse of the impossible conflicts between the divine anathema behind your curse, forcing you to reckon with another's conflicts as well.

spells.name: Delusional Pride
spells.description: You make the target overconfident, leading it to ascribe failure to external factors.

spells.name: Destructive Aura
spells.description: Swirling sands of divine devastation surround you, weakening the defenses of all they touch. Reduce the resistances of yourself and creatures in the area by 2. Heightened (+2) Reduce the resistances by an additional 2.

spells.name: Detect Creator
spells.description: You examine the remains or spiritual residue of a destroyed undead creature to locate that undead's creator, perhaps a necromancer or vampire.

spells.name: Detect Scrying
spells.description: By reading trace auras, you detect the presence of scrying effects in the area.

spells.name: Diamond Dust
spells.description: You supercool the nearby air, forming a cloud of dancing ice crystals in an emanation around you.

spells.name: Dimensional Steps
spells.description: You teleport to a location up to 20 feet away within your line of sight. Heightened (+1) The distance you can teleport increases by 5 feet.

spells.name: Dinosaur Form
spells.description: You channel the primal forces of nature to transform into a Large animal battle form, specifically that of a powerful and terrifying dinosaur.

spells.name: Dirge of Remembrance
spells.description: You sing a funereal dirge to force restless spirits to fully manifest in the Material Plane.

spells.name: Discern Lies
spells.description: Falsehoods ring in your ears like discordant notes. You gain a +4 status bonus to Perception checks when someone Lies.

spells.name: Dispelling Globe
spells.description: You create an immobile globe around yourself that attempts to counteract any spell from outside the globe whose area or targets enter into the globe, as if the globe were a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dispel M…

spells.name: Disperse into Air
spells.description: Trigger You take damage from an enemy or a hazard.

spells.name: Divine Wrath
spells.description: Call divine power in a 20-foot burst. Creates spirit damage against creatures opposed to your deity's alignment. Fortitude save.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d10 for each rank above 4th

spells.name: Door to Beyond
spells.description: Striking at thin air, you create hairline cracks in an unoccupied adjacent space that lead somewhere outside reality.

spells.name: Downpour
spells.description: You call forth a torrential downpour, which extinguishes non-magical flames.

spells.name: Draw the Lightning
spells.description: Calling out to the skies, you summon a bolt of lightning to strike through a foe above you and down into your weapon or your body, charging it with electrical power.

spells.name: Dreamer's Call
spells.description: You create a vivid, illusory daydream drawn from the images of the target's dreams.

spells.name: Dull Ambition
spells.description: You curse the target to fail in all avenues of its life that require drive and ambition, as it inadvertently undermines its own goals at every turn.

spells.name: Dust Storm
spells.description: You call forth a swirling storm of dust. The dust storm obscures vision, with the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mist]. The dust also makes the air unbreathable; creatures in the area must hold their br…

spells.name: Dutiful Challenge
spells.description: As you challenge an enemy, you take some of its attention away from your allies.

spells.name: Ectoplasmic Interstice
spells.description: You force the mortal Universe and Ethereal Planes to partially merge, creating a zone that causes incorporeal and spiritual entities to take on many of the aspects of corporeal creatures.

spells.name: Elemental Gift
spells.description: An elemental force fills your target, granting the target the swiftness of air, the ruggedness of earth, the sting of fire, or the flexibility of water, depending on which element you choose.

spells.name: Elemental Sense
spells.description: The elements grant you sensory enhancements.

spells.name: Elemental Sheath
spells.description: You coat yourself in nature's power. Choose air, earth, fire, metal, water, or wood; the spell gains that trait. You become completely covered by armor formed from that element, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and…

spells.name: Elemental Tempest
spells.description: Your spellcasting surrounds you in a storm of elemental energy.

spells.name: Elephant Form
spells.description: You channel the primal forces of nature to transform into a Large battle form, specifically that of a powerful and terrifying elephant or similar creature, such as a mammoth, mastodon, or anancus.

spells.name: Enduring Might
spells.description: Trigger An attack or effect would deal damage to you.

spells.name: Energy Absorption
spells.description: Trigger An effect would deal acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage to you You're used to mitigating the damage done by bombs, siege engines, and magical artillery.

spells.name: Enervation
spells.description: Extending a finger, you fire a beam of void energy that weakens the life force of any creature it touches.

spells.name: Enhance Senses
spells.description: You enhance the target's senses. The target gains low-light vision, and all of the target's imprecise senses have their distances doubled. If the target already has low-light vision, they gain darkvision. Heightened (+2…

spells.name: Entangle Fate
spells.description: You cause a swirl of energy to entangle the fates of all caught within the blast.

spells.name: Ephemeral Hazards
spells.description: Area (continued) four 10-foot-by-10-foot spaces You create illusory hazards, such as spinning blades or a puddle of acid, in four 10-foot-by–10-foot spaces within range.

spells.name: Eradicate Undeath
spells.description: A massive deluge of life energy causes the undead to fall apart. Each undead creature in the area takes 4d12 vitality damage. Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

spells.name: Euphoric Renewal
spells.description: You view death not as an ending but a beginning, and you delight in dancing on its edge.

spells.name: Fallen Soldier's Lament
spells.description: You raise an illusion in the space of a fallen foe, crafting it to resemble a ghost of your target before parading it across the battlefield.

spells.name: Fallow Field
spells.description: A sickly yellow light fills the area as entropic forces prevent healing.

spells.name: False Nature
spells.description: You create an illusion that makes an object seem to be something entirely different.

spells.name: Familiar Form
spells.description: You transform into a Tiny animal that commonly serves as a spellcaster's familiar.

spells.name: Favorable Review
spells.description: You enchant a creature to ensure they have only good things to say about your show.

spells.name: Fearful Feast
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened] You open your mouth wide and inhale sharply; you draw in the bravery, self-confidence, and hope to which the frightened targe…

spells.name: Fey Form
spells.description: Channeling the mischievous fey, you transform into a fey battle form, which is Medium unless stated otherwise.

spells.name: Filter Air
spells.description: Trigger You're exposed to a poison or disease that has the inhaled trait, and you're aware of the exposure Requirements You breathe air.

spells.name: Fire Shield
spells.description: Surround yourself with a shield of flames. Resistance 5 to cold. Creatures that hit you with melee attacks take 2d6 fire damage. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Flame Barrier
spells.description: Trigger An effect would deal fire damage to either you or an ally within range.

spells.name: Flicker
spells.description: You flicker quickly between your current plane and another.

spells.name: Fly
spells.description: Grant the target a fly Speed equal to its land Speed. Duration 5 minutes.

spells.name: Font of Serenity
spells.description: A divine beacon radiates serenity, soothing nearby allies.

spells.name: Forgotten Lines
spells.description: Members of the Lacunafex and other allies use this spell to restore material that Thrune agents have redacted from historical or otherwise valuable texts.

spells.name: Fortissimo Composition
spells.description: You call upon your muse to greatly increase the benefits you provide with your courageous anthem , rallying anthem , or song of strength composition.

spells.name: Foul Miasma
spells.description: You multiply the disease within a creature, drawing it into an infectious mist outside their body where it can spread to other creatures.

spells.name: Freedom of Movement
spells.description: The target is immune to being grabbed, immobilized, and restrained. It ignores difficult terrain. Duration 10 minutes.

spells.name: Ghostly Tragedy
spells.description: This spell compels local spirits to reenact a violent event of the recent past that you're aware of and name as you Cast the Spell.

spells.name: Ghostly Transcription
spells.description: Glowing letters assemble in the air, providing a transcription of the target's speech in all languages you speak.

spells.name: Girzanje's March
spells.description: You sing a prayer for war, inspiring valor in allies who hear your song.

spells.name: Glass Form
spells.description: You grant the target properties of dull, transparent glass.

spells.name: Glimpse the Truth
spells.description: Divine insight lets you see things as they are, unveiled by attempts to magically cloak the truth.

spells.name: Grasp of the Deep
spells.description: You grip one target with the phantasmal pressure of the deep sea, disorienting and crushing its lungs and joints.

spells.name: Grasping Earth
spells.description: Handlike protrusions of rock and soil grab and bury creatures.

spells.name: Holy Cascade
spells.description: You call upon sacred energy to amplify a vial of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Holy Water], tossing it an incredible distance.

spells.name: Honeyed Words
spells.description: Falsehoods pass your lips as smoothly as silk.

spells.name: Hydraulic Torrent
spells.description: A swirling torrent of water manifests along a straight line, battering creatures and unattended objects in its path and possibly pushing them away from you.

spells.name: Ice Storm
spells.description: You create a gray storm cloud that pelts creatures with an icy deluge.

spells.name: Implement of Destruction
spells.description: You solemnly declare that the target weapon will bring death to a foe, implanting an irrational fear of the weapon into the target enemy's mind.

spells.name: Inevitable Destination
spells.description: You twist the paths of the target, ensuring that each one leads to you.

spells.name: Infectious Melody
spells.description: You call forth the chords of a tune so catchy that foes hearing it can't help but sing along, making it harder for them to communicate.

spells.name: Infiltrator's Tunnel
spells.description: It's best to know the ingress and egress points for any location you plan to rob.

spells.name: Interdisciplinary Incantation
spells.description: Trigger A creature within 30 feet casts an arcane spell.

spells.name: Internal Insurrection
spells.description: You afflict the target with the supernatural disease known as internal insurrection, causing portions of their body to rebel against the whole, leading to painful agonies and, in time, death.

spells.name: Invisibility Cloak
spells.description: You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible], with the same restrictions as the 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Invisibility] spell.

spells.name: Invisibility Curtain
spells.description: You create a transparent invisible wall that makes any creatures on one side of the wall invisible to those on the other side.

spells.name: Isolation
spells.description: You summon a tangible manifestation of loneliness to cloak the target from view as surely as if it were wreathed in darkness.

spells.name: It is Written
spells.description: You envision a future for yourself, confident in the certainty that this vision is your destiny.

spells.name: Know the Enemy
spells.description: Trigger You roll initiative and can see a creature, you succeed at an attack roll against a creature, or a creature fails a saving throw against one of your spells.

spells.name: Life Siphon
spells.description: Trigger You expend one of your wizard spell slots to cast a wizard spell of the necromancy school. You use some of the spell's magic to heal yourself, regaining 1d8 Hit Points per rank of the spell.

spells.name: Life-Draining Roots
spells.description: Thorny roots erupt from your hands in a tangled cascade, puncturing creatures in the way of their growth and revitalizing you.

spells.name: Life's Flowing River
spells.description: You create a flowing river of ghostly water and that sheds dim light for 10 feet on each side.

spells.name: Life's Fresh Bloom
spells.description: The ground around you blooms with life, sprouting sparkling grass, flowers, and small shrubs.

spells.name: Liminal Doorway
spells.description: You draw a chalk doorway on an unbroken surface, which opens into an extradimensional space.

spells.name: Localized Quake
spells.description: You shake the earth, toppling nearby creatures.

spells.name: Lucky Break
spells.description: Trigger You fail, but don't critically fail, a saving throw. Reroll the saving throw and use the better result. You then become temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

spells.name: Luring Wail
spells.description: You emit a plaintive cry to lure your enemies closer.

spells.name: Magic Mailbox
spells.description: You create an interdimensional link between two containers, both of which must be capable of being closed in such a way that their contents aren't visible.

spells.name: Malignant Sustenance
spells.description: You embed a seed of void energy in an undead creature, restoring its unnatural vigor.

spells.name: Mantis Form
spells.description: You become a mantis. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Insect Form], heightened to mantis form's level, and you can only transform into a mantis.

spells.name: Mantis's Grasp
spells.description: You cause red, ghostly mantis arms to sprout from a nearby surface and crush a creature, dealing 8d6 force damage and attempting to pin the target in place.

spells.name: Mercurial Stride
spells.description: Your form ripples as you take on the fluidity and toxicity of quicksilver.

spells.name: Mirage
spells.description: You create an illusion that causes natural terrain to look, sound, feel, and smell like a different kind of terrain.

spells.name: Mirror's Misfortune
spells.description: You split into your real self and a mirrored version of yourself that curses would-be attackers with misfortune on their next attacks.

spells.name: Misty Memory
spells.description: Some say water holds memories or impressions of the past, and you can raise those memories to the surface to glimpse recent events.

spells.name: Morass of Ages
spells.description: You surround yourself in temporal eddies that draw out time for those around you, making every step feel like an eternity endured.

spells.name: Mountain Resilience
spells.description: The target's skin hardens like the stone of a mountain face.

spells.name: Movanic Glimmer
spells.description: You give the target animal a glimmer of awareness, not truly awakening it but allowing it to better understand its surroundings.

spells.name: Murderous Vine
spells.description: You summon a slithering, thorny vine that attempts to constrict and crush a foe against a wall or other surface.

spells.name: Mutilate
spells.description: You cut your own body in a ritualistic manner, causing similar damage to a creature in your line of sight.

spells.name: Mystic Beacon
spells.description: The next damaging or healing spell the target casts before the start of your next turn deals damage or restores Hit Points as if the spell were heightened 1 rank higher than its actual rank.

spells.name: Nature's Bounty
spells.description: A palm-sized raw fruit or vegetable of your choice appears in your open hand.

spells.name: Necrotic Radiation
spells.description: You imbue the touched object or space with slow-acting necrotic radiation.

spells.name: Nightmare
spells.description: You send disturbing nightmares to your target.

spells.name: Ocular Overload
spells.description: Just as a creature is about to attack you, you assault them with jarring illusions, completely surrounding their eyes with blinding flashes of motion and color.

spells.name: Ordained Purpose
spells.description: You call upon the authority of cosmic forces of order, overwhelming creatures with remorse and agony for acting outside of their station and purpose.

spells.name: Outcast's Curse
spells.description: You afflict the target with a curse that makes its presence abrasive and off-putting.

spells.name: Overflowing Sorrow
spells.description: Sadness flows out of you into nearby creatures, blotting out any other thoughts they had.

spells.name: Painful Vibrations
spells.description: You send powerful sound waves through an opponent's body, vibrating its bones and internal organs painfully.

spells.name: Path of Least Resistance
spells.description: You trace several possible routes, quickly resetting the timeline until you find the safest one.

spells.name: Peaceful Bubble
spells.description: An opaque shell of drifting, iridescent runes covers the area, creating a bubble.

spells.name: Perfected Body
spells.description: Trigger You fail or critically fail a saving throw against an effect that has the morph, poison, or polymorph trait, or that would make you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.condit…

spells.name: Pernicious Poltergeist
spells.description: You create an echo of a powerful poltergeist, temporarily anchoring it to the area to terrorize and harm any opponents foolish enough to remain in the area.

spells.name: Personal Runewell
spells.description: Area (continued) 15-foot radius, 30-foot-tall cylinder The runelords of Thassilon pioneered the creation of runewells, magical artifacts that could extract and store the power of sin magic from mortal souls.

spells.name: Pest Swarm
spells.description: Sometimes the most common irritations can band together and become threats to your enemies.

spells.name: Petal Storm
spells.description: You bring forth a cloud of razor-sharp flower petals that thrash violently in the wind.

spells.name: Phantasmal Killer
spells.description: Create an illusion of the target's worst fear. Will save, then Fortitude save. Can deal mental damage, frightened, and even kill on critical failure.

spells.name: Phantasmal Protagonist
spells.description: You create a phantasmal incarnation of a significant character from a novel, historical work, or religious parable.

spells.name: Phoenix Ward
spells.description: You raise a fiery shield around yourself, gaining resistance 10 to fire.

spells.name: Planar Tether
spells.description: You stitch the target to its current plane.

spells.name: Precious Metals
spells.description: Your deity blesses base metals to transform them into precious materials.

spells.name: Procyal Philosophy
spells.description: The racoon-like visage of a sagacious procyal appears, dispensing helpful advice.

spells.name: Prophet's Luck
spells.description: Trigger You or a creature within range attempts a saving throw against an obvious threat.

spells.name: Protector's Sphere
spells.description: A protective aura emanates out from you, safeguarding you and your allies.

spells.name: Pulse of Civilization
spells.description: You tap into the zeitgeist of any settlements in range.

spells.name: Purifying Veil
spells.description: Drawing on the purifying powers of water, you call forth a veil of fine water droplets suffused with holy energy.

spells.name: Radiant Beam
spells.description: You fire a beam of blinding light from your outstretched hands.

spells.name: Radiant Heart of Devotion
spells.description: You speak a fervent prayer for the heavens to assist you and your righteous allies.

spells.name: Ranage's Circle
spells.description: Many stories tell of a clearing deep in the Mwangi jungle, surrounded by ancient cypress trees.

spells.name: Rapid Retreat
spells.description: Trigger You take damage from an attack or spell.

spells.name: Ravenous Portal
spells.description: You place a ward upon the door that triggers when a creature attempts to open, unlock, or destroy the door.

spells.name: Read Omens
spells.description: You peek into the future. Choose a particular goal or activity you plan to engage in within 1 week, or an event you expect might happen within 1 week. You learn a cryptic clue or piece of advice that could help with the…

spells.name: Rebounding Barrier
spells.description: Trigger You are hit by a physical Strike. You swiftly raise a reflective barrier, reducing physical damage and rebounding it onto your attacker. You gain resistance 10 against one physical damage type the triggering att…

spells.name: Rebuke Death
spells.description: You snatch creatures from the jaws of death, restoring them without the straing of a typical close call.

spells.name: Reflected Beauty
spells.description: When you cast reflected beauty, choose a willing creature that's the same size as you and that you can see within 30 feet.

spells.name: Reflective Scales
spells.description: You grow a set of colored, glowing scales or scaled armor that stores energy before releasing it in a final burst.

spells.name: Remember the Lost
spells.description: You call upon the lost and forgotten, assailing your foes' minds with the memories of those who died with a grievance toward them.

spells.name: Repel Metal
spells.description: Trigger A Strike with a metallic weapon or projectile would hit you or an ally within range.

spells.name: Replicate
spells.description: You create an illusory magical double that physically looks and behaves very similarly to the target.

spells.name: Resilient Sphere
spells.description: Encase a creature in a sphere of force. Reflex save to negate. The creature inside is protected from — and unable to affect — things outside. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Retributive Pain
spells.description: Trigger A creature in range damages you. You vengefully reflect your pain upon your tormentor. The target takes mental damage equal to half the triggering damage.

spells.name: Rewrite Memory
spells.description: You alter the target's memories by erasing a memory, enhancing a memory's clarity, altering a memory, or adding a false memory.

spells.name: Rigid Form
spells.description: You utilize wood's rigidity to prevent harmful shapechanging effects.

spells.name: Roar of the Dragon
spells.description: You channel the might of dragons into your voice, letting out a roar that engenders respect in dragonkind but that instills fear in most other creatures.

spells.name: Rope Trick
spells.description: You cause the target rope to rise vertically into the air.

spells.name: Rune of Observation
spells.description: You inscribe an invisible eye-shaped rune in the air, creating a sensor as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Clairvoyance].

spells.name: Runic Impression
spells.description: Your unarmed attacks or weapon gain the benefits of a weapon rune you choose when you cast this spell: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Corrosive], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Flaming], @UUID[Compen…

spells.name: Rust Cloud
spells.description: Red-blown flecks of rust jitter in the air, forming a cloud of agitated particles.

spells.name: Rusting Grasp
spells.description: You cause the target to rapidly rust. This magical rust can affect nonferrous materials, but the target must be all or mostly metal. Skymetals such as adamantine and orichalcum are immune to this rust, and the GM might …

spells.name: Sacred Nimbus
spells.description: You summon a small, fluffy white nimbus cloud that floats 10 feet above the ground and rains down pleasantly warm sanctified water.

spells.name: Safeguard Secret
spells.description: You ensure a secret remains safe from prying spies.

spells.name: Sage's Curse
spells.description: You afflict the target with a curse that fills its mind with distracting and hyperspecialized minutiae, causing it to second-guess even simple facts.

spells.name: Sanguine Mist
spells.description: You unleash a cloud of foul, blood-sucking fog that drains the vitality from the living to bolster your own.

spells.name: Seal Fate
spells.description: You utter a curse that a creature will meet a certain end—a death by freezing, stabbing, or another means you devise.

spells.name: Shaken Confidence
spells.description: Trigger An enemy within 30 feet of you critically fails an attack roll, Perception check, or skill check.

spells.name: Shape Stone
spells.description: You shape the stone into a rough shape of your choice.

spells.name: Shared Nightmare
spells.description: Merging minds with the target, you swap distressing visions.

spells.name: Shielding Formation
spells.description: You conjure magical shields of force to protect your allies around you.

spells.name: Shifting Form
spells.description: You change your body to better suit the moment.

spells.name: Show the Path
spells.description: You grant the target insight on things to come, guiding them toward a fate they find most fitting and encouraging them to continue this journey.

spells.name: Shroud of the Mantis
spells.description: You wrap yourself in a crimson cloak that renders you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible], with the same restrictions as a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Invisibility] spell.

spells.name: Sliding Blocks
spells.description: You conjure up to six 5-foot stone cubes you can gently move with a gesture.

spells.name: Snake Fangs
spells.description: Your jaw unhinges as your teeth extend into wicked fangs.

spells.name: Soft Landing
spells.description: You create a magical field that buoys any creature or object falling into the area, providing a harmless landing from any height.

spells.name: Solid Fog
spells.description: You conjure a bank of fog so thick it impedes movement as well as sight. This functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mist], except that the area is also difficult terrain. You can Dismiss the spell.

spells.name: Songbird's Call
spells.description: Your voice calls a storm of songbirds that whirl around you and peck at your enemies.

spells.name: Soothing Spring
spells.description: Steam wisps into the air as a stone-lined pool appears in the ground and fills with hot water that bubbles up from the earth.

spells.name: Spell Immunity
spells.description: The target is immune to one specific spell of 2nd rank or lower for the duration. Duration 24 hours.

spells.name: Spike Stones
spells.description: Long, sharp spikes of solid rock thrust up from the ground in the area.

spells.name: Spiral of Horrors
spells.description: Shades and spirits howl and whirl around you in a display that strikes fear into the hearts of all who witness it.

spells.name: Spiritual Anamnesis
spells.description: Memories of a past life that seem incredibly real (and may even be) overwhelm the target's mind.

spells.name: Spiritual Attunement
spells.description: You attune yourself to a spiritual plane of the Outer Sphere, connecting your spirit without fully transporting to it.

spells.name: Spiritual Renewal
spells.description: You draw upon the restorative power of the spirits around you. The target gains fast healing 8. Heightened (+1) The fast healing increases by 2. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Spell Effect: Spiritual Renewal]

spells.name: Stasis
spells.description: The flow of time congeals around an object or creature, holding it in place.

spells.name: Steal Voice
spells.description: You steal a creature's voice, rendering them mute.

spells.name: Stifling Stillness
spells.description: You make all air in the target area unnaturally still and unyielding, creating a shimmering haze.

spells.name: Stonesense
spells.description: You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense to a range of 100 feet, but you can only sense vibrations through natural stone (not masonry, adobe, or any other manufactured edifice).

spells.name: Stoneskin
spells.description: The target's skin hardens to stone. Resistance 5 to physical damage (except adamantine). Duration 20 minutes.

spells.name: Stormwind Flight
spells.description: Powerful winds carry you smoothly through the air, giving you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.description: Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist.

spells.name: Swarm Form
spells.description: You discorporate into a swarm of Tiny creatures.

spells.name: Swarming Wasp Stings
spells.description: You manifest a swarm of disembodied wasp stingers that stab creatures in the area, possibly poisoning them.

spells.name: Take its Course
spells.description: When someone has overindulged, you can hasten them past the worst of their affliction or intensify their misery.

spells.name: Talking Corpse
spells.description: You grant the target corpse a semblance of life, which it uses to speak the answers to three questions posed to it.

spells.name: Telepathy
spells.description: You can communicate telepathically with creatures within 30 feet.

spells.name: Tempt Fate
spells.description: Trigger You or an ally within range attempts a saving throw.

spells.name: Tireless Worker
spells.description: You suppress your choice of one of the following conditions that's affecting the target: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Encumbered], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.co…

spells.name: Tomorrow's Dawn
spells.description: The golden light of a new dawn and the promise of life beyond death radiates from your body.

spells.name: Tortoise and the Hare
spells.description: You prove that slow and steady doesn't always win the race by turning a foe into a proverbial tortoise and yourself or an ally into a hare, siphoning some of the foe's speed and granting it to the other target.

spells.name: Touch of the Moon
spells.description: When you touch the target, a symbol of the moon appears on its forehead, glowing with soft moonlight.

spells.name: Transcribe Moment
spells.description: You instantly create a small, permanent scroll that contains a magically precise written description of your current surroundings in every direction.

spells.name: Translocate
spells.description: Teleport yourself up to 120 feet to a location you can see. If you use 2 actions, you can't act further on your turn.

fixedLevels.5: Range increases to 1 mile; you don't need line of sight

spells.name: Translocate
spells.description: You instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to an unoccupied space within range you can see.

spells.name: Traveler's Transit
spells.description: You add power to your muscles, allowing you to swim or climb walls with ease.

spells.name: Trickster's Feathers
spells.description: You conjure four magic feathers, each with the potential to hold a single illusory guise.

spells.name: Trickster's Twin
spells.description: You rarely settle for being in just one place.

spells.name: Umbral Graft
spells.description: You reflect a spell into a shadowy version of itself, in the process depleting the power of the initial spell.

spells.name: Unfettered Movement
spells.description: You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement.

spells.name: Unity
spells.description: Trigger You and 1 or more allies within range are targeted by a spell or ability that allows a saving throw.

spells.name: Unsettling Knowledge
spells.description: You share a piece of hidden knowledge with a creature that is both upsetting and intriguing.

spells.name: Vampiric Maiden
spells.description: A ghostly iron maiden snaps shut on the target and drains its vitality for your gain.

spells.name: Vapor Form
spells.description: The target transforms into a vaporous state.

spells.name: Variable Gravity
spells.description: You can adjust how strongly gravity grips you, changing between low gravity, normal gravity, and high gravity with ease.

spells.name: Vicious Howl
spells.description: You howl with passion for your cause, empowering yourself to push beyond your limits.

spells.name: Vision of Beauty
spells.description: You create a phantasmal image of the most beautiful creature imaginable to the target at a location somewhere within the spell's range.

spells.name: Vision of Death
spells.description: You force the target to see a vision of its own death.

spells.name: Vital Beacon
spells.description: Vitality radiates outward from you, allowing others to supplicate and receive healing.

spells.name: Vital Luminance
spells.description: Drawing life force into yourself, you become a beacon of vitality.

spells.name: Waking Dream
spells.description: You cloud the target's mind with vivid, dreamlike imagery, so they have difficulty distinguishing real threats from imagined ones.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.description: Create a wall of flame up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high. Creatures entering or ending their turn adjacent take fire damage (Reflex basic save). Duration 1 minute.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d6 for each rank above 4th

spells.name: Wall Of Mirrors
spells.description: You create a solid wall of shimmering reflective glass up to 50 feet long and 20 feet high.

spells.name: Weapon Storm
spells.description: Area 30-foot cone or 10-foot emanation You swing a weapon you're holding, and the weapon magically multiplies into duplicates that swipe at all creatures in either a cone or an emanation.

spells.name: Weaponize Secret
spells.description: You understand that holding a secret is in itself a kind of power.

spells.name: Whispers of the Void
spells.description: You whisper baleful secrets that transcend language and carry magically to the ears of your foes.

spells.name: Wild Winds Stance
spells.description: You take on the stance of the flowing winds, sending out waves of energy at a distance.

spells.name: Wind Whispers
spells.description: You call forth numerous breezes in which you weave gossip, whispering subtly into the ears of those around.

spells.name: Winning Streak
spells.description: The target is energized by its good fortune as it spreads to others-as long as they keep winning.

spells.name: Wood Walk
spells.description: Wood shapes itself according to your will readily, making staircases appear as you climb up the side of a tree, automatically weaving vines into ladders, or lowering branches to lift you up to the top.

spells.name: Word of Freedom
spells.description: You utter a liberating word of power that frees a creature.

spells.name: Wordsmith
spells.description: You're a devotee of knowledge with an unmatched command of the language used to spread that knowledge, and you can reshape the written word into a form more understandable to your audience.

spells.name: Ymeri's Mark
spells.description: You place the fiery mark of the Queen of the Inferno on the target, burning into the creature's very essence.

spells.name: Zeal for Battle
spells.description: Trigger You and at least 1 ally are about to roll initiative.

spells.name: Zephyr Slip
spells.description: Trigger A creature enters a space within 5 feet of you.

spells.name: Aberrant Form
spells.description: Harnessing the power of vile entities, you transform yourself into a Large aberration.

spells.name: Abyssal Plague
spells.description: Your touch afflicts the target with Abyssal plague, which siphons fragments of their soul away to empower the Abyss.

spells.name: Acid Storm
spells.description: You evoke a storm of acid rain that pelts the area for the spell's duration. A creature that begins its turn in the area takes 3d8 acid damage (basic Reflex save). Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d8.

spells.name: Ancestral Winds
spells.description: You call on the same energies that manifest ancestor storms, summoning wailing spirits to terrorize your foes.

spells.name: Arcane Countermeasure
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range that you can see Casts a Spell.

spells.name: Bandit's Doom
spells.description: You ward the target item against those who would steal it.

spells.name: Banishment
spells.description: Send a creature back to its home plane. Will save — on critical failure the target is permanently banished. On failure, stunned 1 and sent home for 1 minute.

spells.name: Belittling Boast
spells.description: You boast about your skills or combat prowess, bolstering your own abilities and belittling your opponents.

spells.name: Black Tentacles
spells.description: Writhing tentacles fill a 20-foot burst. Creatures in the area are grabbed and take bludgeoning damage each round. Fortitude save to escape. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Blackfinger's Blades
spells.description: You pray for swift and painful death to your enemies and find your and your allies' weapons blessed to deliver just that.

spells.name: Blazing Fissure
spells.description: A thin crack rips through the earth, erupting with magma, then swiftly seals up.

spells.name: Blessing of Defiance
spells.description: Channeling forth the power to persevere in the face of adversity, you grant the target the means to deny danger and avoid dire harm.

spells.name: Blind Eye
spells.description: You enchant a single object, preventing it from being used for magical observation.

spells.name: Blinding Bottle
spells.description: You conjure an exploding glass container filled with a sight-stealing poison and hurl it across enemy lines.

spells.name: Blinding Foam
spells.description: You spray a colorful, caustic foam into the target's eyes, which clings to their face.

spells.name: Blink Charge
spells.description: You propel yourself through the fabric of space to deal a blow carrying the momentum of your teleportation.

spells.name: Blister
spells.description: You point at a target in range, and its skin grows searing blisters filled with caustic fluid.

spells.name: Blood Feast
spells.description: Your head splits vertically into an enormous maw, which feasts upon the target's blood, dealing 12d6 piercing damage, depending on your spell attack roll.

spells.name: Blood-Feasting Breath
spells.description: Area (continued) two 30-foot cones Like a vorpal dragon, you absorb life with an inhale and release it with an exhale.

spells.name: Boomerang Shot
spells.description: You launch a curved length of wood at a foe that arcs around objects and obstacles to strike from an unexpected direction.

spells.name: Breath of Life
spells.description: Reaction when an ally within range is reduced to 0 HP. Restore 4d8 HP, potentially preventing death.

heightening.perInterval: The healing increases by 1d8 for each rank above 5th

spells.name: Celestial Brand
spells.description: A blazing symbol appears on the target, cursing it to face divine justice.

spells.name: Chameleon Coat
spells.description: You shift the colors of the targets' outermost layer of clothing and gear to be closer to their environment when they remain still.

spells.name: Chromatic Wall
spells.description: You create an opaque wall of light in a single vibrant color.

spells.name: Chthonian Wrath
spells.description: You evoke the energy of a part of the Outer Rifts.

spells.name: Cleansing Flames
spells.description: You wrap the target in purifying flames. You can attempt to counteract a single poison or non-curse effect imparting the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzl…

spells.name: Cloak of Colors
spells.description: A cloak of swirling colors shrouds the target.

spells.name: Cone of Cold
spells.description: Blast cold through a 60-foot cone, dealing cold damage. Reflex basic save.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 5th

spells.name: Confusing Cry
spells.description: You give an unsettling, warbling cry that causes nearby creatures to lash out without control.

spells.name: Consuming Darkness
spells.description: Your shadow wriggles before spreading out from you, forming a gateway of clinging, consuming shadow through which the horrors of another plane can barely be seen.

spells.name: Control Water
spells.description: Area 50 feet long by 50 feet wide By imposing your will upon the water, you can raise or lower the level of water in the chosen area by 10 feet.

spells.name: Corrosive Muck
spells.description: Area all squares in two @Template[burst|distance:10]{10-foot bursts}.

spells.name: Crushing Despair
spells.description: Overwhelm creatures in a 30-foot cone with despair. Will save — on failure slowed 1 for 1 minute. On critical failure, slowed 2.

spells.name: Curse of Death
