spells.description: Your patron wraps a hand around your target's heart.

spells.name: Dance of Darkness
spells.description: You dance, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Stride]{Striding} up to half your Speed.

spells.name: Death Ward
spells.description: The target gains a +4 status bonus to saves against death effects and void damage. It can't be drained. Duration 10 minutes.

spells.name: Desperate Repair
spells.description: Trigger A shield within range would be reduced to 0 Hit Points by a damaging effect Requirements The triggering shield had more than 1 Hit Point before taking damage.

spells.name: Diadem of Divine Radiance
spells.description: You don a diadem of radiant light, which sheds bright light to a range of 60 feet and dim light to a further 60 feet.

spells.name: Divine Dragon's Watch
spells.description: You summon an invisible divine draconic spirit to watch over your target.

spells.name: Divine Immolation
spells.description: Divine flames scour creatures within the area.

spells.name: Domora's Defense
spells.description: Domora Hume is considered by most to be the first god caller, conjuring a god from the Plane of Water named Dyzad to protect his town from Mammoth Lord raiders.

spells.name: Dragon Wings
spells.description: Leathery wings sprout from your back, giving you a fly Speed of 60 feet or your Speed, whichever is faster.

spells.name: Dreaming Potential
spells.description: You draw the target into a lucid dream where it can explore the endless possibilities of its own potential within the everchanging backdrop of its dreamscape.

spells.name: Drop Dead
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range is hit by an attack from an enemy.

spells.name: Ectoplasmic Expulsion
spells.description: You call upon tendrils of ephemeral ectoplasm to pass through the target and carry away a harmful psychic affliction.

spells.name: Elemental Blast
spells.description: Area @Template[burst|distance:10], @Template[cone|distance:30], or @Template[line|distance:60] You gather elemental energy and blast your foes in one of the various listed shapes of your choosing, dealing 8d6 damage.

spells.name: Elemental Breath
spells.description: You open a miniature portal to an elemental plane within your mouth, then exhale a powerful explosion of the plane's element.

spells.name: Elemental Form
spells.description: You call upon the power of the planes to transform into a Medium elemental battle form.

spells.name: Engrave Memory
spells.description: You store memories inside a stone. This memory can convey up to 10 minutes of material. When you Cast this Spell, choose a command word. Doing so creates a carved symbol on the stone that hints at the word. Any creature…

spells.name: Entwined Roots
spells.description: Slithering roots gird you and your allies in layers of flexible wooden protection.

spells.name: Establish Ward
spells.description: You bind a part of your essence to your surroundings, creating a warded area that grants you power within it, but drains you outside of it.

spells.name: Etheric Shards
spells.description: You reach out and sow glittering splinters of force throughout the area, otherworldly caltrops of will and ectoplasm.

spells.name: False Vision
spells.description: You create a false image that fools any attempts to scry on an area.

spells.name: Fey Glamour
spells.description: You call upon fey glamours to cloak an area or the targets in illusion.

spells.name: Fire's Pathway
spells.description: You step into a blazing fire that's big enough for you to fit inside and instantly teleport to any other fire within 5 miles that also has a sufficiently large size.

spells.name: Flame Dancer
spells.description: Fire encircles the target's hands and feet, and its eyes and hair catch ablaze.

spells.name: Flame Strike
spells.description: Call a column of divine fire in a 10-foot burst. Half fire damage, half spirit damage (spirit portion not reduced by fire resistance). Reflex basic save.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 5th

spells.name: Flames of Ego
spells.description: Elegant flames of incredible beauty coruscate across the target's body, creating overconfidence and carelessness.

spells.name: Flammable Fumes
spells.description: Sending magic deep underground, you conjure a cloud of toxic gases that swiftly degenerate into volatile fumes.

spells.name: Flowing Strike
spells.description: A wave of flowing water rushes behind you like an elegant river, pushing you across the battlefield with fluid grace.

spells.name: Forceful Hand
spells.description: A Medium floating, disembodied hand made of magical force appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to you, following you across the battlefield to shield you against your foes' attacks.

spells.name: Freezing Rain
spells.description: Intense cold rain comes from nowhere, a microcosm of a sudden downpour, and a magical tweak can turn the rain to freezing sleet.

spells.name: Geyser
spells.description: Area 10-foot radius, 50-foot-tall cylinder A powerful geyser blasts up from the ground, potentially pushing creatures on top of it into the air.

spells.name: Glacial Heart
spells.description: Ice and bone-deep cold assail the target, freezing it from the inside out.

spells.name: Glimmer of Charm
spells.description: You're bathed in a smooth, almost glittering aura that improves the attitude of those near you.

spells.name: Gluttonous Growth
spells.description: Plants in the area grow rapidly, taking on carnivorous characteristics as they seek to consume prey.

spells.name: Grasping Grave
spells.description: Hundreds of skeletal arms erupt from the ground in the area, clawing at creatures within and attempting to hold them in place.

spells.name: Grisly Growths
spells.description: This gruesome spell causes the target to grow excess limbs and organs, whether it be fingers multiplying until hands resemble bushes, eyes popping open in bizarre places, legs sprouting from the side of the body, or som…

spells.name: Hallucination
spells.description: The target consistently detects one thing as another, can't detect something that's there, or detects something that's not there, though it doesn't alter their beliefs.

spells.name: Harm (Mass)
spells.description: 3-action Harm heightened to rank 5. Void energy damages all living creatures in a 30-foot emanation for 5d8 HP. Heals undead.

spells.name: Heal (Mass)
spells.description: 3-action Heal heightened to rank 5. Positive energy heals all living creatures in a 30-foot emanation for 5d8 HP. Harms undead with Fortitude save.

spells.name: Healing Well
spells.description: You call forth a well of healing that you and your allies can draw from later.

spells.name: Hellfire Plume
spells.description: You call forth a plume of hellfire that erupts from below, dealing 4d6 fire damage and 4d6 spirit damage. Heightened (+1) The fire and spirit damage each increase by 1d6.

spells.name: Howling Blizzard
spells.description: Freezing winds extend from your hands, pushing away from you with great force.

spells.name: Hunter's Vision
spells.description: Your target glows with a magical aura visible only to you and those who follow your lead.

spells.name: Illusory Scene
spells.description: You craft an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area.

spells.name: Imaginary Lockbox
spells.description: You turn a container and its contents into an imaginary form stored in your mind that only you can see and interact with.

spells.name: Impaling Spike
spells.description: You conjure a spike that thrusts up from the earth beneath a target creature, potentially impaling it.

spells.name: Incendiary Fog
spells.description: You summon a cloud of flammable black dust.

spells.name: Inevitable Disaster
spells.description: You briefly glimpse cause and effect, putting into motion a chain of events that will visit doom on your enemy at some point in the future, though you're not quite sure when or how the doom will occur.

spells.name: Infectious Comedy
spells.description: You tell a magical joke and infect a target with laughter that spreads to those nearby.

spells.name: Instant Minefield
spells.description: You create several hidden mines throughout the area that explode when stepped on.

spells.name: Invoke Spirits
spells.description: Ragged apparitions of the dead rise to stalk the living.

spells.name: King's Castle
spells.description: You and a willing creature swap places. You appear in the target's former space, and the target appears in your former space. You and your target must each be able to fit in the new spaces within range; otherwise, the s…

spells.name: Lashunta's Life Bubble
spells.description: You create a replenishing protective bubble of fresh, temperate air around the target.

spells.name: Let Not the Fallen Rest
spells.description: You exhort your fallen comrades to return to the battle.

spells.name: Lightning Storm
spells.description: You create a black, rumbling storm cloud and call down one lightning bolt within the spell's area.

spells.name: Magic Passage
spells.description: You create a visible tunnel through the wall in the chosen area, replacing the area with empty space.

spells.name: Mantle of the Frozen Heart
spells.description: You surround yourself in a mantle of frigid ice magic, and your skin and armor morph into cold blue ice.

spells.name: Mantle of the Magma Heart
spells.description: You surround yourself in a mantle of blazing fire magic, and your skin and anything you're wearing morphs into burning hot lava.

spells.name: Mantle of the Melting Heart
spells.description: You bathe yourself in a mantle of liquid metal, gilding your skin and armor with an oily sheen.

spells.name: Mantle of the Unwavering Heart
spells.description: Vines and branches envelop you in an instant, growing a wild bloom of colors that open to reveal your new form.

spells.name: Mariner's Curse
spells.description: You afflict the target with the curse of the roiling, unforgiving sea.

spells.name: Mind Probe
spells.description: You cast your thoughts through a creature's mind, sifting for information.

spells.name: Mirecloak
spells.description: You wrap the targeted creatures in thin, sickly green shrouds that sap information from attackers.

spells.name: Mirror Malefactors
spells.description: You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in a shimmering ring of illusory mirrors that follows it as it moves, even when the creature moves outside the range of the spell.

spells.name: Moon Frenzy
spells.description: A feral aspect overcomes the targets, filling them with strength and ferocity.

spells.name: Nature's Pathway
spells.description: You step into a living tree with a trunk big enough for you to fit inside it and instantly teleport to any tree within 5 miles that also has a sufficiently large trunk.

spells.name: Ode to Ouroboros
spells.description: Trigger A creature's dying condition would reach the value at which they would die.

spells.name: Over the Coals
spells.description: You accuse the target of breaking its word to you and invoke the wrath of your patron to claim what's due, demanding the target pay you in currency, fulfill an order, or stand down.

spells.name: Pack Breaker
spells.description: You can deceive creatures by changing their perception of their allies' behavior.

spells.name: Pillars of Sand
spells.description: You raise one or more pillars of solid sand from the earth.

spells.name: Plant Form
spells.description: Taking inspiration from verdant creatures, you transform into a Large plant battle form.

spells.name: Portrait of the Artist
spells.description: You change your appearance to look like a well-known artist talented at a particular craft or performance, such as a painter, singer, or orator, with the effects of illusory disguise.

spells.name: Pressure Zone
spells.description: Air pressure drops precipitously, causing pain and debilitation in creatures' inner ears and joints.

spells.name: Pulverizing Wake
spells.description: Imitating raptorial creatures, you attack with such speed it drives a sonic shockwave.

spells.name: Quicken Time
spells.description: You speed up the time stream in an area, stretching and pulling it until time flows swift and wild.

spells.name: Rallying Banner
spells.description: You create an illusory banner representing a revolution, social movement, or organization such as the Firebrands.

spells.name: Ravening Maw
spells.description: You evoke Zevgavizeb's unceasing hunger and inflict it upon your target.

spells.name: Repelling Pulse
spells.description: You unleash a powerful pulse of telekinetic power, and the pulse violently hurls creatures away from you.

spells.name: Restorative Moment
spells.description: Your patron weaves the threads of time around the target, giving them some of the benefits of a day's passage.

spells.name: Return Beacon
spells.description: You create a unique planar beacon somewhere within the spell's range that remains in place.

spells.name: Rewinding Step
spells.description: You anchor your location in time so that you can swiftly retrace your steps later with complex chronomancy.

spells.name: Rewrite Possibility
spells.description: You continually glimpse into the target's future and nudge fate to guide them toward the best possible outcome.

spells.name: Rip the Spirit
spells.description: You supernaturally rip the spirit from a living creature's body, dooming the target to pain and death.

spells.name: Ritual Obstruction
spells.description: You establish a zone of magical feedback that makes it impossible to succeed at rituals of this spell's rank or lower in the area.

spells.name: Sawtooth Terrain
spells.description: You cause long, serrated mantis limbs to appear, swiping at and obstructing creatures in the area.

spells.name: Scouring Pulse
spells.description: Area 10-foot radius, 60-foot-tall cylinder You inundate the area with concentrated vitality energy, which scours away the stain of undeath.

spells.name: Scouting Eye
spells.description: You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible], floating eye, 1 inch in diameter, at a location you can see within 500 feet.

spells.name: Secret Chest
spells.description: You banish a container and its contents to the Ethereal Plane, where you can retrieve it from later.

spells.name: Sending
spells.description: You send the creature a mental message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

spells.name: Shadow Blast
spells.description: Shape shadows into a blast that damages creatures in a 20-foot burst. Deals void damage with a basic Reflex or Will save (your choice).

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d8 for each rank above 5th

spells.name: Shadow Jump
spells.description: You instantly transport yourself from one shadow to another.

spells.name: Shadow Siphon
spells.description: Trigger A spell or magical effect deals damage.

spells.name: Shall not Falter, Shall not Rout
spells.description: Calling out the fifth line of the Crimson Oath, you seal your most grievous injuries with a stroke of your blade.

spells.name: Shepherd of Souls
spells.description: You stay the hand of fate for one not yet destined to die, sacrificing some of your own vitality to heal them.

spells.name: Shock and Awe
spells.description: You create the illusion of cannons exploding, bullets and arrows flying, and magical ballistics firing, as an overwhelming torrent of information, both visual and auditory.

spells.name: Slither
spells.description: A mass of snakes made of shadow rise up to capture creatures in the area.

spells.name: Speak with Stones
spells.description: You can ask questions of and receive answers from natural or worked stone.

spells.name: Spectral Advance
spells.description: Taking on a spiritual form, you flash across the battlefield to engage an enemy.

spells.name: Spellmaster's Ward
spells.description: You create one or more glowing protective runes that revolve around you.

spells.name: Spiritual Guardian
spells.description: A Medium guardian made of magical force appears in an unoccupied space in range.

spells.name: Spiritual Torrent
spells.description: You release your spiritual essence in a torrential blast of energy, dealing 10d6 damage.

spells.name: Spiritual Transport
spells.description: You call upon the spiritual energies surrounding you to teleport you to an unoccupied space within range that you can see.

spells.name: Stagnate Time
spells.description: You examine the time stream in a particular area, then proceed to stick a few metaphorical pins into it, thickening and slowing down the flow of time until it rumbles along like a river of molasses.

spells.name: Steal the Sky
spells.description: Trigger You make a successful unarmed Strike against a flying creature.

spells.name: Stormburst
spells.description: Your voice projects like cracking thunder as you summon a localized storm, creating a fearsome surge of lightning and wind that deals 6d6 electricity damage.

spells.name: Strange Geometry
spells.description: Area 4 cubes, each 10 feet on a side You cause the areas to appear to swell, bend, and break, twisting together in a bizarre spatial geometry.

spells.name: Subconscious Suggestion
spells.description: You implant a subconscious suggestion deep within the target's mind for them to follow when a trigger you specify occurs.

spells.name: Summon Anarch
spells.description: You conjure a chaotic celestial, monitor, or fiend to fight on your behalf.

spells.name: Summon Axiom
spells.description: You conjure a lawful celestial, monitor, or fiend to fight on your behalf.

spells.name: Summon Celestial
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the celestial trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Dragon
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the dragon trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Entity
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the aberration trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Fiend
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the fiend trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Giant
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the giant trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Healing Servitor
spells.description: You call forth a servitor forged from raw vitality energy to heal and bolster your allies.

spells.name: Summon Monitor
spells.description: You summon a creature that has the monitor trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Symphony of the Unfettered Heart
spells.description: Your symphony lifts listeners from their worldly concerns.

spells.name: Synaptic Pulse
spells.description: You emit a pulsating mental blast that penetrates the minds of all enemies in the area.

spells.name: Synesthesia
spells.description: The target's senses cross. Will save — on failure clumsy 3, off-guard, and -3 to Perception. On critical failure, also stunned 1.

fixedLevels.9: You can target up to 5 creatures

spells.name: Telekinetic Haul
spells.description: You move the target up to 20 feet, potentially suspending it in midair.

spells.name: Telepathic Bond
spells.description: The targets can communicate telepathically with any or all of the other targets from any point on the same planet.

spells.name: Temporary Glyph
spells.description: Area 5-foot square You temporarily bind a hostile spell into a symbol.

spells.name: Terrain Transposition
spells.description: You mystically transpose your current location with another.

spells.name: Toxic Cloud
spells.description: Conjure a 20-foot burst of poisonous fog. Creatures in the area take poison damage (Fortitude basic save). Sustained: moves 10 feet each round. Duration 1 minute.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d8 for each rank above 5th

spells.name: Toxic Cloud
spells.description: You conjure a poisonous fog. This functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mist], except the area moves 10 feet away from you each round. You deal 6d8 poison damage to each breathing creature that starts its t…

spells.name: Transmute Rock And Mud
spells.description: Area 2 adjacent 10-foot cubes You warp the structure of earthen material, turning rock into mud or mud into rock.

spells.name: Truespeech
spells.description: The target can understand all spoken and signed languages. Duration 1 hour.

spells.name: Truespeech
spells.description: The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures.

spells.name: Umbral Journey
spells.description: You move partially into the Netherworld, using its warped nature to speed your travels.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Aura
spells.description: You focus your sight inside and call on your inner fire to grant you warmth, steady your vision, and soothe your body.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Vapor
spells.description: Trigger You're targeted by an attack made by an attacker you can see.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Buffet
spells.description: You surround your unarmed attacks with the speed and force of air.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Roots
spells.description: You manipulate the earth beneath your feet to throw your enemies off balance, leaving chunks of rock and rubble behind.

spells.name: Unusual Anatomy
spells.description: You transform your flesh and organs into a bizarre amalgam of glistening skin, rough scales, tufts of hair, and tumorous protuberances.

spells.name: Vindicator's Judgment
spells.description: You pronounce a terrible judgment upon your quarry that causes all of your attacks and divine spells to strike with deadly efficacy.

spells.name: Wall of Flesh
spells.description: You craft a 20-foot-tall wall of living flesh in a straight line up to 30 feet long.

spells.name: Wall of Ice
spells.description: You sculpt an ice barrier that blocks sight and, once shattered, freezes foes.

spells.name: Wall of Stone
spells.description: Create a wall of solid stone up to 60 feet long, 10 feet high, and 4 inches thick. Each 5-foot section has AC 10, Hardness 14, 28 HP. Duration: permanent if not destroyed.

spells.name: Wave of Despair
spells.description: You inflict despair on creatures in the area.

spells.name: Wind Jump
spells.description: You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed. You must end your turn on solid ground, or you fall. Heightened (6th) At the end of your turn, you can attempt a @Check[acrobatics|dc:30] check to find purchase in midair. If yo…

spells.name: Wisdom of the Winds
spells.description: You ask a question of the spirits of air, imploring them to send signals through the winds to help you find your way.

spells.name: Wish-Twisted Form
spells.description: You focus your magic upon an enemy, wishing for their defenses to fail and turning their strengths into weaknesses.

spells.name: Wronged Monk's Wrath
spells.description: You unleash your ki as a powerful storm of force and lightning, dealing 2d6 force damage and 2d12 electricity damage to creatures in the area.

spells.name: Wyvern Sting
spells.description: You duplicate the venomous sting of a wyvern.

spells.name: You're Mine
spells.description: You manipulate the target's emotions, potentially allowing you to control it for a brief instant.

spells.name: Accelerated Decomposition
spells.description: You speed the natural process of a creature's decline and debilitation.

spells.name: Ancestral Form
spells.description: You take the form of your ancestral spirits, becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] and quasi-corporeal.

spells.name: Arrow Salvo
spells.description: You conjure an immense wooden bow that launches a salvo of massive arrows at all nearby enemies.

spells.name: Ash Form
spells.description: You take the form of a cloud of minuscule ash particles.

spells.name: Aura of the Unremarkable
spells.description: You and allies in the area appear to be completely innocuous to other creatures within the spell's area, regardless of the actions you're committing.

spells.name: Awaken Entropy
spells.description: All things age, all things die, and at the end of days, even the universe will grow quiet and still.

spells.name: Blade Barrier
spells.description: Blades of force form a churning wall. The wall is a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick, and it provides cover. The wall deals 7d8 force damage to each creature that's in the wall's space when …

spells.name: Blanket of Stars
spells.description: A flowing cloak of utter darkness drapes over you, filled with pinpricks of light like distant stars.

spells.name: Blessed Boundary
spells.description: Manifestations of divine force appear in the hundreds, swirling in a massive, protective sphere.

spells.name: Blinding Fury
spells.description: Trigger A creature damages you. You curse the target with your outrage at being attacked. The effect is determined by the target's Will save. Critical Success The target is unaffected. Success The target can't @UUID[Com…

spells.name: Boots on the Ground
spells.description: You craft the illusion of your army being much bigger than it actually is, hoping to overwhelm the opposing forces and shatter their hopes.

spells.name: Bound in Death
spells.description: You tether another creature's spirit to your own, shunting part of the damage dealt to you onto one of your foes.

spells.name: Bounty of the Sky
spells.description: You call forth a flock of geese that drop restorative fruits and breads from the sky as they fly overhead.

spells.name: Cast into Time
spells.description: You release a wave of temporal energy that sends creatures violently tumbling through time, scarring their thoughts with the information flowing around them.

spells.name: Catch Your Name
spells.description: Trigger A creature on your plane speaks your private or true name Requirements You know your own true name.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description: Strike a primary target with lightning, then chain to up to 4 secondary targets within 30 feet. Reflex basic save. Secondary targets take reduced damage.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d12 for each rank above 6th

spells.name: Champion's Sacrifice
spells.description: Trigger An ally is hit by a Strike, or an ally fails a saving throw against an effect that doesn't affect you.

spells.name: Chromatic Image
spells.description: You call forth three illusory images of yourself, and each of the four of you takes on a different color, your colors all shifting each time someone attacks you.

spells.name: Claim Undead
spells.description: You attempt to wrest control of a target undead or force it to recognize you as its master.

spells.name: Collective Transposition
spells.description: You teleport the targets to new positions within the area.

spells.name: Crimson Breath
spells.description: You turn a creature toward you and exhale a blast of crimson mist from your mouth, exposing the target to a toxic miasma.

spells.name: Cursed Metamorphosis
spells.description: You transform the target creature into a harmless animal appropriate to the area, with effects based on its Fortitude save.

spells.name: Daemon Form
spells.description: You infuse yourself with the corrupting death and pure malevolence of Abaddon, transforming into a Large daemon battle form.

spells.name: Demon Form
spells.description: You corrupt yourself with the sin of the Outer Rifts, transforming into a Medium demon battle form.

spells.name: Devil Form
spells.description: You bind yourself to the power of Hell, transforming into a Medium devil battle form.

spells.name: Disintegrate
spells.description: Fire a beam of pure destruction. Spell attack dealing untyped damage. On a hit, Fortitude save or be utterly destroyed. Against objects, always deals double damage.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d10 for each rank above 6th

spells.name: Dragon Form
spells.description: Calling upon powerful magic, you gain a Large dragon battle form.

spells.name: Dread Secret
spells.description: You utter a powerful secret at odds with the fundamental nature of the target creatures.

spells.name: Earth and Sky
spells.description: You erupt into the air with the force of a dragon taking flight, launching nearby creatures into the sky with you.

spells.name: Elemental Confluence
spells.description: You conjure four types of elementals who combine forces to form into a chaotic storm.

spells.name: Entreat the Many
spells.description: You manifest echoes of all the spirits you've ever bonded with at once, in a spiraling cyclone of colorful forms.

spells.name: Explosive Barrage
spells.description: Area (continued) 20-foot burst plus additional @Template[burst|distance:5]{5-foot bursts} You fire a booming, fiery explosion followed by a salvo of smaller blasts, each cracking the air with the sound of thunder.

spells.name: Fateful Condemnation
spells.description: You draw upon the target's negative fate, causing this lingering destiny to afflict it and its nearby allies with the unintended consequences of its past lives.

spells.name: Field of Life
spells.description: Create a 20-foot burst of healing energy. Living creatures in the area regain HP. Undead take vitality damage. Fortitude save for undead.

heightening.perInterval: The healing/damage increases by 1d8 for each rank above 6th

spells.name: Field of Razors
spells.description: You grind a chunk of your choice of metal to fine dust between your hands and blow it into the air, where it grows into a tangle of wires covered in razor-sharp prongs.

spells.name: Fire Seeds
spells.description: Four acorns grow in your hand, their shells streaked with pulsing red and orange patterns.

spells.name: Flame Vortex
spells.description: Area 5-foot radius, 40-foot tall cylinder You combine a blazing inferno and air currents into a fiery vortex.

spells.name: Flaming Fusillade
spells.description: You call upon an endless barrage of flames, a series of explosions bursting around you like miniature suns.

spells.name: For Love, For Lightning
spells.description: When you Cast the Spell, you plunge the required weapon into the ground, where it crackles with crimson lightning.

spells.name: Frost Pillar
spells.description: Ice crystallizes around a creature, imprisoning it within an icy pillar.

spells.name: Frozen Fog
spells.description: You conjure a chilling mist that settles into the bones and makes it difficult to move.

spells.name: Gray Shadow
spells.description: You pray over a dying creature, drawing its shadow into your service as long as its owner is stooped at death's door.

spells.name: Hag's Fruit
spells.description: You imbue a single piece of fruit with a curse that leaves its victims in a magical sleep.

spells.name: Halcyon Infusion
spells.description: You infuse magical energy into your target, opening up their mind to the pathways of magic and granting them the ability to use magic to affect the world around them.

spells.name: Harm (Rank 6)
spells.description: Harm heightened to rank 6. Deals 6d8 void damage to living (1 action touch, 2 actions ranged). 3 actions: 6d8 to all living in 30-foot emanation.

spells.name: Heal (Rank 6)
spells.description: Heal heightened to rank 6. Restores 6d8 HP to a living target (1 action touch, 2 actions ranged). 3 actions: 6d8 HP to all living in 30-foot emanation.

spells.name: Heinous Future
spells.description: You hold up a fractured mirror to the target, and in that mirror it sees a thing that may yet come to pass—a ghastly foretelling that the target instinctively knows is eerily possible.

spells.name: Heroic Feat
spells.description: You gain the ability to perform a specialized combat technique from the vast wealth of martial knowledge your mystery provides.

spells.name: Heroism (Greater)
spells.description: Grant +2 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, saving throws, and skill checks. Duration 10 minutes.

spells.name: Life-Giving Form
spells.description: You transcend your physical form, becoming a beacon of healing energy.

spells.name: Lignify
spells.description: You turn the target's flesh slowly into wood.

spells.name: Lure Dream
spells.description: You reach out to the dream realm, beckoning an animate dream to your side.

spells.name: Manifold Lives
spells.description: You cast a creature's mind back through time, forcing them to take other paths and make other choices, experiencing countless alternate lives in an instant.

spells.name: Mantle of Heaven's Slopes
spells.description: You surround yourself in a mantle of heavenly power, invoking the power of the layers of the celestial mountain above.

spells.name: Mislead
spells.description: You turn yourself @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] and create an illusory duplicate of yourself.

spells.name: Missed Cue
spells.description: You make the spell's target believe they had something incredibly important to say but forgot to say it, and now they've missed their opportunity.

spells.name: Moonlight Bridge
spells.description: You summon a bridge of radiant, shimmering moonlight.

spells.name: Nature's Reprisal
spells.description: The plant life within the area begins to writhe and lash out against your enemies as you call upon nature to impede your foes.

spells.name: Necrotize
spells.description: You necrotize part of a creature's body, harming it and debilitating it as its body putrefies, mimicking the natural process of decay.

spells.name: Never Mind
spells.description: Take control of a creature's mind. Will save — on critical failure the target obeys your commands. Duration 1 day (or until freed). The target can attempt a Will save each time you give a command against its nature.

spells.name: Never Mind
spells.description: You drastically reduce the target's mental faculties.

spells.name: Pain of Ages
spells.description: You sense a spiritual resonance of deep anguish in the earth beneath your feet, the walls surrounding you, or the fragments of souls left behind in a place of calamity.

spells.name: Personal Ocean
spells.description: You surround yourself in a bubble-like shroud of seawater that fills your space completely and moves with you.

spells.name: Petrify
spells.description: Begin turning a creature to stone. Fortitude save — on failure slowed 1 and must save at end of each turn or be permanently turned to stone.

spells.name: Petrify
spells.description: The target's body slowly turns into a stone statue.

spells.name: Phantasmal Calamity
spells.description: An illusion of a catastrophe damages creatures in a 30-foot burst. Will save for mental damage. On critical failure, also stunned 1.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 6th

spells.name: Phantom Orchestra
spells.description: You orchestrate an invisible ensemble of lost sounds captured inside errant breezes across the Plane of Air, and you can direct this symphony to attack foes within range.

spells.name: Poltergeist's Fury
spells.description: Your fury spills over in a telekinetic storm of terrifying proportions.

spells.name: Primal Summons
spells.description: You enhance a summoned creature with the power of the elements.

spells.name: Purple Worm Sting
spells.description: You replicate the attack of a deadly purple worm.

spells.name: Raise Dead
spells.description: Return a creature that has been dead no longer than 3 days to life. The creature returns at 1 HP with the wounded 1 condition.

spells.name: Ravenous Darkness
spells.description: You create a shroud of magical darkness that feeds on those inside it.

spells.name: Repulsion
spells.description: You manifest an aura that prevents creatures from approaching you.

spells.name: Revel in Retribution
spells.description: Time seems to slow for you, allowing you to strike your opponents mid-move.

spells.name: Rose's Thorns
spells.description: Rose bushes with razor-sharp thorns sprout from the ground in the area.

spells.name: Sacred Form
spells.description: You focus all your divine energy and transform yourself into a battle form, similar to your normal form and of the same size as you, but wielding powerful divine armaments.

spells.name: Scintillating Safeguard
spells.description: Trigger An effect would deal physical or energy damage to you or a creature in range.

spells.name: Scrying
spells.description: You magically spy on a creature of your choice.

spells.name: Seize Identity
spells.description: With a gleeful cackle, you seize an individual's voice and swallow it.

spells.name: Shadow Illusion
spells.description: You create a shadowy illusion of a creature or a stationary object, but the illusion can exist only in an area of dim light or darkness.

spells.name: Shambling Horror
spells.description: You reanimate the corpse of a fallen creature as an undead minion under your control.

spells.name: Siege Weapon's Blessing
spells.description: You trace a magic rune onto the body of a siege weapon, calling upon fate or your faith to guide the attacks your allies make with this machine.

spells.name: Skeleton Army
spells.description: With a fistful of compressed bones, you summon a legion of skeletal hulks to fight in your war, refusing to let them rest until they've given up their last inches of usefulness to your cause.

spells.name: Slow (Mass)
spells.description: Heightened Slow that can target up to 10 creatures. Fortitude save or slowed 1.

spells.name: Speaking Sky
spells.description: The air speaks to you. You can precisely sense any motion within 60 feet through vibration and air movement. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Spell Effect: Speaking Sky]

spells.name: Spellsurge
spells.description: Magic surges to life around you, feeding on the raw power you radiate.

spells.name: Spellwrack
spells.description: You cause a creature's magic to turn against it. Will save — on failure persistent force damage and must succeed at a flat check to cast spells.

spells.name: Spirit Blast
spells.description: You concentrate energy from the spirit world to blast a creature's spirit body. Fortitude save. Deals spirit damage that bypasses resistances to physical damage.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 6th

spells.name: Stone to Flesh
spells.description: Manipulating the fundamental particles of matter, you convert stone into flesh and blood.

spells.name: Suspended Retribution
spells.description: All life dances one step from the precipice, one heartbeat from disaster.

spells.name: Tanglecurse
spells.description: Tanglebriar has been called a "curse on the land," which has inspired Treerazer's cult to develop this notorious spell.

spells.name: Tangling Creepers
spells.description: Dense, twitching creepers sprout from every surface and fill any bodies of water in the area.

spells.name: Teleport
spells.description: You and the targets are instantly transported to any location within range, as long as you can identify the location precisely both by its position relative to your starting position and by its appearance (or other iden…

spells.name: Tempest Form
spells.description: Your body becomes fluid to better suit your surroundings.

spells.name: Temporal Ward
spells.description: You ward a target doorway or container with a temporal trap that rewinds the personal timeline of creatures trying to open it.

spells.name: Tree of Seasons
spells.description: You cause a Small tree to instantly sprout in an unoccupied space on the ground.

spells.name: True Seeing
spells.description: See things as they truly are. You can see through illusions, invisibility, darkness, and transmutations. Duration 10 minutes.

spells.name: Truesight
spells.description: You see things within 60 feet as they actually are.

spells.name: Unexpected Transposition
spells.description: Trigger You are targeted with an enemy's Strike.

spells.name: Utter Destruction
spells.description: You screech with an unearthly voice made of destructive energy, smashing everything that lies before you.

spells.name: Vampiric Exsanguination
spells.description: Draw the life force from creatures in a 30-foot cone. Fortitude basic save dealing void damage. You regain temporary HP equal to half the damage dealt.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 6th

spells.name: Vibrant Pattern
spells.description: You create a pattern of lights that pulses with intensity.

spells.name: Vitrifying Blast
spells.description: You launch a cone of glass shards, which embed in creatures to turn them partially to glass.

spells.name: Wall of Force
spells.description: Create an invisible wall of pure force up to 50 feet long and 20 feet high. The wall is immune to damage and spells below 7th rank. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Wall of Metal
spells.description: You call forth a sheet of metal, forming a wall of iron, low-grade cold iron, or standard-grade silver up to 60 feet long, 30 feet high, and 1/4 inch thick.

spells.name: Word of Revision
spells.description: Trigger A creature within range fails or critically fails a saving throw or is reduced to 0 Hit Points As all good writers know, you shouldn't kill off your protagonist before their story is complete.

spells.name: Zealous Conviction
spells.description: You bypass your targets' rational minds, instilling them with unshakable conviction and zeal.

spells.name: Zero Gravity
spells.description: Area 20-foot radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder You negate gravity's effects in the area.

spells.name: Angel Form
spells.description: Invoking the celestial realms, you transform into a Medium angel battle form.

spells.name: Attacked from Within
spells.description: You assert your power over the target's own spirit as you reach deep into its soul in order to discover a moment of excruciating anguish, debilitating humiliation, or abject despair.

spells.name: Beheading Buzz Saw
spells.description: You compress molten scraps pulled from the Plane of Metal into a spinning disc with gruesome blades protruding from its edges.

spells.name: Blightburn Blast
spells.description: You channel a blast of powerful blightburn radiation from your hands.

spells.name: Chrysopoetic Curse
spells.description: You grant the target the gift of riches, giving them the power to turn anything they touch to gold.

spells.name: Contingency
spells.description: You prepare a spell that will trigger later.

spells.name: Control Sand
spells.description: You whip up a small sandstorm around your body.

spells.name: Corrosive Body
spells.description: You exhale corrosive gas, and acidic secretions coat your skin as you transform into a being of living acid.

spells.name: Cosmic Form
spells.description: You recreate your form entirely out of cosmic energy, transforming into a Large battle form.

spells.name: Curse of the Spirit Orchestra
spells.description: You summon an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible], insubstantial group of extraplanar musicians who follow the target and play distracting music to hinder its actions.

spells.name: Dancing Fountain
spells.description: Area 30-foot burst centered on you Tapping the ground, you create a shallow pool of water that spreads over the affected area, and majestic sprays, jets, and mists of water erupt forth in a dazzling water show.

spells.name: Darklight
spells.description: Shadows pour forth from your eyes, creating a field of darkness that prevents light from emanating within the area.

spells.name: Deity's Strike
spells.description: A manifested version of your deity's favored weapon appears in the air above and attacks the target, using your spell attack roll.

spells.name: Devouring Void
spells.description: Countless tears in space appear in the area, like hungry mouths.

spells.name: Divine Decree
spells.description: You utter a potent litany from your faith, a mandate that harms those who oppose your ideals.

spells.name: Divine Vessel
spells.description: You accept otherworldly energies into your body; while you are still recognizably yourself, you gain the features of one of your deity's servitors.

spells.name: Duplicate Foe
spells.description: You create a temporary duplicate of an enemy to fight on your behalf.

spells.name: Eclipse Burst
spells.description: Darkness blasts in a 60-foot burst. Reflex save. Deals void damage and blinds creatures that critically fail.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d10 for each rank above 7th

spells.name: Energy Aegis
spells.description: A magical barrier protects the target against energy damage, granting resistance 10 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, and sonic. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Entrancing Eyes
spells.description: Your eyes glow with an entrancing radiance that captivates those who meet your gaze.

spells.name: Ethereal Jaunt
spells.description: You travel to the Ethereal Plane, which overlaps the Material Plane.

spells.name: Execute
spells.description: Point at a creature and draw out its life force. Fortitude save dealing void damage. On critical failure, the creature is instantly killed if at 50 HP or fewer.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d6 for each rank above 7th

spells.name: Execute
spells.description: You point at a creature and invoke the demise of all things.

spells.name: Fiery Body
spells.description: You become living flame, giving you fire immunity, resistance 10 to precision damage, and weakness 5 to cold and to water.

spells.name: Final Fate of the Locust Host
spells.description: You conjure the rotting corpse of Deskari, previously Lord of the Locust Hosts, to the battlefield.

spells.name: Force Cage
spells.description: Trap a creature in a cage of force. Reflex save to avoid. The cage has AC 10, Hardness 20, HP 40. Duration 1 hour.

spells.name: Frigid Flurry
spells.description: You place a palm to your lips and exhale a cold breath, whipping up a gust of wind that freezes the air's ambient moisture into a flurry of jagged shards.

spells.name: Haste (Mass)
spells.description: Heightened Haste that affects up to 6 targets. All gain quickened (Stride or Strike only). Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Hasted Assault
spells.description: You call upon your magic to speed up your attacks. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Quickened] condition and can use the extra action each round for only Strike actions.

spells.name: Heaving Earth
spells.description: You strike the ground, and unleash a wave that travels through the struck surface to the target.

spells.name: Hungry Depths
spells.description: A spiral of dark, corrupted water appears in the ground, plunging open a door to the depths that seems to descend for miles.

spells.name: Indolent Haze
spells.description: The faint scent of poppies and a soothing calm fill the area, urging creatures to lay down and take a rest, to do nothing at all, ever again.

spells.name: Inexhaustible Cynicism
spells.description: You inflict your targets with a crushing doubt about everyone and everything around them.

spells.name: Interplanar Teleport
spells.description: Transport yourself and up to 8 willing targets to another plane of existence. The exact destination is imprecise.

spells.name: Interplanar Teleport
spells.description: Requirements You have a planar key for the destination plane, used as a locus You and your allies traverse the barriers between planes of existence.

spells.name: Leng Sting
spells.description: You use the power of nightmares to magically replicate the venomous attack of the aberrant and cunning Leng spiders.

spells.name: Lifewood Cage
spells.description: You create an immobile, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible] prison of hardened wood suffused with vital energy from the Forge of Creation.

spells.name: Love's Sacrifice
spells.description: Trigger You take damage that would reduce you to 0 Hit Points.

spells.name: Mask of Terror
spells.description: The target's face becomes a mask of terror. Each creature within 30 feet that sees the target must make a Will save vs frightened. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Maze of Locked Doors
spells.description: The target of your spell is drawn into a long, twisting, extradimensional hallway blocked at 30-foot intervals with high-grade duskwood doors (Hardness 20, HP 80, BT 40, @Check[athletics|dc:30|name:Force Open Duskwood D…

spells.name: Momentary Recovery
spells.description: You instantly teleport yourself and any items you're wearing or holding from your current space to a clear space within range that you can see.

spells.name: Moonburst
spells.description: A powerful globe of chilling moonlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 cold damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d10[vitality]] damage to undead creatures.

spells.name: Orb of Twisting Fate
spells.description: The glass orb of an omen dragon erupts from your target's forehead, overwhelming their mind with alternative options.

spells.name: Planar Palace
spells.description: You grow an extradimensional demiplane consisting of a spacious dwelling with a single entrance.

spells.name: Planar Seal
spells.description: You create a visible magical barrier that attempts to counteract teleportation effects and planar travel into or out of the area, including items that allow access to extradimensional spaces.

spells.name: Pollen Pods
spells.description: Area four unoccupied 5-foot squares, each of which is at least 20 feet apart You cultivate four wooden bulbs, each filled with toxic pollen and sensitive to motion.

spells.name: Possession
spells.description: You send your mind and soul into the target's body, attempting to take control.

spells.name: Power Word Blind
spells.description: You utter an arcane word of power that can make the target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] upon hearing it.

spells.name: Prismatic Armor
spells.description: You wrap the target in armor made of multicolored light.

spells.name: Prismatic Spray
spells.description: A spray of seven-colored beams in a 30-foot cone. Each creature is struck by 1-2 random effects (fire, acid, electricity, poison, petrification, mental, sent to another plane).

spells.name: Project Image
spells.description: You project an illusory image of yourself.

spells.name: Ray of Corruption
spells.description: You unleash a sickly gray beam of toxic spores at your target.

spells.name: Recall Legacy
spells.description: You establish a mental link with the target, focusing on a piece of knowledge important to their culture, family (by birth or choice), or home settlement.

spells.name: Regenerate
spells.description: The target regains 15 HP at the start of each of its turns. Can regrow lost limbs. Duration 1 minute.

fixedLevels.9: Regeneration increases to 20 HP per turn

spells.name: Restore Ground
spells.description: You sense that this place yearns to throw off the shackles of civilization.

spells.name: Retrocognition
spells.description: Opening your mind to mental echoes, you gain impressions from past events that occurred in your current location.

spells.name: Return To Essence
spells.description: You unravel the magic of a spell that affects a container, door, or lock, converting it into energy you can repurpose to power your own spells.

spells.name: Reverse Gravity
spells.description: Area (continued) 20-foot radius, 40-foot tall cylinder You reverse gravity in the area.

spells.name: Shadow Raid
spells.description: You spin illusions of flying shadows throughout the area.

spells.name: Shadow's Web
spells.description: Grasping darkness surges from you, dealing 14d4 void damage.

spells.name: Shock to the System
spells.description: A dense lightning cloud descends to fill the target's space, then fires a jolt of revitalizing lightning into the target.

spells.name: Soothing Ballad
spells.description: You draw upon your muse to soothe your allies.

spells.name: Spell Riposte
spells.description: Trigger You're the target of a spell you're aware of.

spells.name: Spell Turning
spells.description: This abjuration reflects spells cast at you back at their caster.

spells.name: Summon Stampede
spells.description: You summon an unstoppable stampede of panicking beasts.

spells.name: Sunburst
spells.description: A burst of sunlight in a 60-foot burst. Reflex save dealing fire damage. Undead and creatures with light weakness take extra damage and are blinded on failure.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d10 for each rank above 7th

spells.name: Telekinetic Bombardment
spells.description: You grasp a piece of the landscape—such as a tree, carriage, or piece of masonry—and lob it in your foe's direction.

spells.name: Tempest of Shades
spells.description: You channel the forces of undeath to briefly call forth an amalgam of the vengeful dead slain by your enemies and allies alike.

spells.name: Time Beacon
spells.description: You create a beacon in time to return to it if things go wrong.

spells.name: True Target
spells.description: You delve into the possible futures of the next few seconds to understand all the ways your foe might avoid harm, then cast out a vision of that future to those around you.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Emblem
spells.description: Trigger Your last action was a successful Strike against an enemy You emblazon the target with a fiery sigil that projects your sight and your flame onto them, allowing you and your allies to track their movements and m…

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Barrier
spells.description: You create a protective circle around yourself that repels your foes.

spells.name: Unfettered Pack
spells.description: You free those who travel alongside you from environmental hindrances.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Blitz
spells.description: You blitz forward so quickly that you soar through the air, and nothing can react to you.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Augmentation
spells.description: Your unarmed attacks are treated as cold iron and silver, they gain the earth trait, and they gain a +1 status bonus to damage rolls per damage die.

spells.name: Vacuum
spells.description: You inhale all air in the surrounding area, stealing the breath of nearby creatures.

spells.name: Vibrant Vibrato
spells.description: Your voice trills in perfect vibrato. When casting the spell, you can make the area any radius you choose, up to 40 feet. The reverberations of your voice continue to shimmer and hang in the air as long as you Sustain t…

spells.name: Visions of Danger
spells.description: An illusion of horrific creatures fills the spell's area.

spells.name: Volcanic Eruption
spells.description: Area 5-foot radius, 80-foot-tall cylinder The ground opens up, spraying a column of lava high into the air in a vertical cylinder, dealing 14d6 fire damage to creatures in the area.

spells.name: Warp Mind
spells.description: You scramble a creature's mental faculties and sensory input.

spells.name: All is One, One is All
spells.description: You meld the targets' matter and life force into one and then, in an instant, sift them back out into their component selves.

spells.name: Antimagic Field
spells.description: You repel all magic from the target area, preventing spells and other magic from functioning.

spells.name: Arctic Rift
spells.description: A jagged crack opens in the air, dealing 12d8 cold damage as it draws away warmth.

spells.name: Boil Blood
spells.description: You heat a foe's blood and boil it within its veins.

spells.name: Burning Blossoms
spells.description: Area 30-foot radius, 100-foot tall cylinder An intangible hollow tree sprouts from the ground and grows to towering height, radiating a fiery passion and fascinating viewers.

spells.name: Canticle of Everlasting Grief
spells.description: You create a melody distilled from pure grief, conveying the inevitable loss of everything your target cherishes, audible to only them.

spells.name: Clockwork Devotion
spells.description: You toss a handful of magical cogs before you, summoning a battalion of clockwork soldiers to fight your enemies.

spells.name: Clone Companion
spells.description: You create a duplicate of your companion, and the duplicate fights alongside its twin, mirroring the original's actions.

spells.name: Confusing Colors
spells.description: A cloud of cascading, ever-changing colors manifests in the air.

spells.name: Deluge
spells.description: You unleash a catastrophic downpour in the area that vanishes an instant later.

spells.name: Desiccate
spells.description: Drain moisture from all creatures in a 30-foot burst. Fortitude basic save dealing void damage. Plants and water elementals use a lower degree of success.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d10 for each rank above 8th

spells.name: Desiccate
spells.description: You pull the moisture from the targets' bodies, dealing 10d10 void damage.

spells.name: Devour Life
spells.description: You attempt to utterly consume the target's life force.

spells.name: Disappearance
spells.description: You shroud a creature from others' senses.

spells.name: Divine Armageddon
spells.description: You call forth a divine cataclysm from your deity, destroying living and undead creatures in the area alike.

spells.name: Divine Aura
spells.description: You surround yourself with a divine aura in a 10-foot emanation. Allies gain +1 status to AC, saves, and attack rolls. Enemies take spirit damage when entering.

spells.name: Divine Inspiration
spells.description: You infuse a target with spiritual energy, refreshing its magic.

spells.name: Dream Council
spells.description: When you Cast this Spell, any targets-including you-can choose to immediately fall asleep.

spells.name: Earthquake
spells.description: The ground shakes in a 60-foot burst. Reflex save — failure: knocked prone, take bludgeoning damage. Fissures open: critical failure may trap creatures. Structures take damage.

spells.name: Falling Sky
spells.description: Area 60-foot tall, 30-foot radius cylinder Extraordinary telekinetic pressure smashes down through the area, battering creatures within it to the ground.

spells.name: Ferrous Form
spells.description: Your body transforms entirely into flexible iron.

spells.name: Hidden Mind
spells.description: Powerful wards hide a creature from magic that would spy on it or affect its mind.

spells.name: Holy Host
spells.description: In stories, armies with just and righteous causes win with little difficulty, conquering unholy legions.

spells.name: Hypnopompic Terrors
spells.description: You send a wave of nightmarish visions crashing over your targets, leaving them paralyzed by fear.

spells.name: Impaling Briars
spells.description: The ground within the area transforms into a mass of dangerous briars that assault and impede your foes.

spells.name: Maze
spells.description: Banish a creature to an extradimensional maze. The creature must use Survival DC 25 to escape. Duration sustained up to 1 minute.

spells.name: Medusa's Wrath
spells.description: You make an attack filled with a medusa's petrifying power.

spells.name: Migration
spells.description: The targets naturally take on animal forms most fitting their movement and environment.

spells.name: Mimic Spell
spells.description: Trigger A creature you're aware of within range Casts a Spell of the same tradition as mimic spell and of the same or lower rank.

spells.name: Moment of Renewal
spells.description: Heal up to 6 creatures, restoring 4d8+8 HP each. Also removes one of: blinded, confused, deafened, enfeebled, clumsy, or drained.

spells.name: Monstrosity Form
spells.description: You transform into the shape of a legendary monster, assuming a Huge battle form.

spells.name: Musical Shift
spells.description: With a quick series of wrist flicks, music fills the air.

spells.name: Part the Mists to Paradise
spells.description: You conjure a pathway to paradise, visible only to you and your allies through a dense cloud of magical mist.

spells.name: Pinpoint
spells.description: You learn the name of the target's exact location (including the building, community, and country) and plane of existence.

spells.name: Polar Ray
spells.description: Fire a blue-white ray of extreme cold. Spell attack dealing cold damage. On a hit, the target is drained 2.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d8 for each rank above 8th

spells.name: Power Word Stun
spells.description: You stun the target with an arcane word of power.

spells.name: Prismatic Wall
spells.description: You create an opaque wall of shimmering, multicolored light.

spells.name: Prying Survey
spells.description: You create eight invisible, floating eyes, each about 3 inches in diameter, that scan the area around you, transmitting rough impressions of the environment.

spells.name: Punishing Winds
spells.description: Area (continued) 30-foot-radius, 100-foot-tall cylinder Violent winds and a powerful downdraft fill the area, forming a cyclone.

spells.name: Quandary
spells.description: You transport the target into an extraplanar puzzle room of mysterious origin, locking them there.

spells.name: Rainbow Fumarole
spells.description: Area 20-foot radius, 60-foot-tall cylinder Multi-hued flames break through cracks in the ground, reaching high into the sky and giving off dangerous fumes.

spells.name: Scintillating Pattern
spells.description: A pattern of dazzling lights in a 20-foot burst. Will save — dazzled on success, confused on failure, stunned and confused on critical failure.

spells.name: Spirit Song
spells.description: Your eldritch song sends pulsing waves of ethereal energy to attack creatures' spirits in the area, dealing 14d6 spirit damage that causes their bodies to momentarily freeze up from the hypnotic nature of the tune, depe…

spells.name: Spiritual Epidemic
spells.description: You curse the target, sapping its spirit and leaving a contagious trap in its essence.

spells.name: Sudden Transposition
spells.description: You wrench the targets off their feet, forcefully teleporting them within the area.

spells.name: Summon Archmage
spells.description: You briefly call forth the spirit of a legendary wizard from ages long past, which manifests as an immense humanoid figure (typically an elf or a human).

spells.name: Summon Deific Herald
spells.description: Your faith is strong enough to briefly summon a direct representative of your deity, such as the deity's herald.

spells.name: Summon Elemental Herald
spells.description: Your meditation into the different elemental planes connects you to them deeply, and this connection allows you to summon a herald of an elemental lord.

spells.name: Summon Irii
spells.description: You cast your spell, whisper your words of power, and find that an irii is already here—indeed, they've always been here, and always were, and always will be.

spells.name: Summon Warden of the Wild
spells.description: You briefly call forth the spirit of one of the Wardens of the Wild, the legendary guardians of nature.

spells.name: Take Your Places
spells.description: The scene would play out exactly as you envisioned it, if only the actors would respect their blocking.

spells.name: Touch of Death
spells.description: Make a melee unarmed Strike. If you hit and the target is alive, anytime during the duration, you can spend a single action, which has the auditory and concentrate traits, to speak a word of death that could instantly s…

spells.name: Uncontrollable Dance
spells.description: The target can't stop dancing. Will save — off-guard and -2 to Reflex saves. On critical failure, also slowed 1. Sustained up to 1 minute.

spells.name: Undermine Reality
spells.description: You lash a target with tendrils of shadow that steal some of its substance, making it quasi-real.

spells.name: Unholy Army
spells.description: Reaching out to the legions of the wicked, you call upon them for assistance.

spells.name: Unrelenting Observation
spells.description: This spell grants perfect sight based on scrying, allowing several willing targets to track the exact movements or position of one creature or object.

spells.name: Whirlpool
spells.description: Area 25-foot radius, 20-foot tall cylinder With a spin of your hand, you create a large swirling vortex of storming waves.

spells.name: Whirlwind
spells.description: Area (continued) 15-foot radius, 80-foot-tall cylinder Powerful winds coalesce into a devastating tornado.

spells.name: Arcane Explosion
spells.description: Your body is temporarily converted into a ball of pure magic, rapidly exploding outward and reforming as a glowing sphere, after which you eventually regain your normal form.

spells.name: Astral Labyrinth
spells.description: You connect the entire area with an invisible maze of astral energy that interferes with dimensional and mental magic.

spells.name: Beseech Arcanotheign
spells.description: With a whispered prayer or arcane sending, you conjure Arcanotheign, herald of Nethys.

spells.name: Bilocation
spells.description: You exist in two places at once. When you Cast the Spell, another copy of yourself appears in an adjacent square. During bilocation's duration, whenever you act, you can choose which of your selves does so, and whenever…

spells.name: Call Fluxwraith
spells.description: You break a mirror and cast the shards into the air.

spells.name: Crusade
spells.description: You issue a divine mandate or proclaim a cause to the targets.

spells.name: Detonate Magic
spells.description: You cause the magic within the target to dissipate in a destructive explosion.

spells.name: Dimensional Excision
spells.description: You manipulate the boundaries between planes like a scalpel, using it to cut away portions of a creature's essence and banishing those portions to other realities and dimensions, afflicting the target deep lacerations o…

spells.name: Disjunction
spells.description: Crackling energy disjoins the target. You attempt to counteract it. If you succeed, it's deactivated for 1 week. On a critical success, it's destroyed. If it's an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

spells.name: Divinity Leech
spells.description: You disrupt the connection between a divine caster or deific servitor and their deity, blocking their use of divine power.

spells.name: Embrace Nothingness
spells.description: You empty your body of substance, becoming one with nothingness.

spells.name: Falling Stars
spells.description: Area 4 40-foot bursts You reach into the skies and call down an array of falling stars that explode upon colliding with the ground.

spells.name: Foresight
spells.description: Grant a creature a sixth sense. The target is never flat-footed, gains +2 to initiative, and you can use a reaction to grant +2 to AC or saves. Duration 1 hour.

spells.name: Forest of Gates
spells.description: You transport yourself and your allies to a peaceful extraplanar realm of towering trees, each of which holds a misty gateway to another location.

spells.name: Implosion
spells.description: Crush a creature with immense inward pressure. Fortitude save dealing bludgeoning damage. Sustained to repeat each round.

spells.name: Linnorm Sting
spells.description: You replicate the fiery venom of the tor linnorm and inflict an enemy with the dread dragon's debilitating bite.

spells.name: Magnetic Dominion
spells.description: The roiling magnetic fields of the Plane of Metal radiate from you as you channel and reshape them at your merest thought.

spells.name: Massacre
spells.description: A wave of void energy in a 60-foot line. Creatures must attempt Fortitude saves. Any creature reduced to 0 HP is immediately killed. Void damage.

spells.name: Metamorphosis
spells.description: Harnessing your mastery of transformative magic, you hide forms within forms.

spells.name: Meteor Swarm
spells.description: Call four meteors that crash into different 40-foot bursts. Each deals fire and bludgeoning damage. Reflex basic save. Bursts can overlap.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 2d10 for each rank above 9th

spells.name: Nature's Enmity
spells.description: Animals, plants, and fungi in the area turn against the targets.

spells.name: One with the Land
spells.description: You merge with an adjacent natural feature with enough volume to fit you and your worn and held possessions, such as the ground or a large tree.

spells.name: Overwhelming Presence
spells.description: Creatures in a 40-foot burst must make a Will save or prostrate themselves in your presence. On failure, creatures are stunned 1 each round. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Phantasmagoria
spells.description: You fill the targets' minds with endless images, like countless dreams and lives colliding with each other.

spells.name: Power Word Kill
spells.description: You utter the most powerful arcane word of power.

spells.name: Prismatic Shield
spells.description: Shield-sized shards of multicolored light manifest in the air around you, each rotating quickly to intercept attacks.

spells.name: Prismatic Sphere
spells.description: You create a seven-layered sphere to protect an area.

spells.name: Proliferating Eyes
spells.description: You implant an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Invisible], magical eye sensor on the target's body.

spells.name: Qi Form
spells.description: Drawing from deep wells of spiritual power, you take on a special qi form.

spells.name: Resplendent Mansion
spells.description: You conjure a towering mansion up to four stories tall and up to 300 feet on a side.

spells.name: Seize Soul
spells.description: You trap the target's soul in the item before the soul can pass on to the afterlife.

spells.name: Storm Lord
spells.description: The sky above you darkens in a matter of moments, swirling with ominous clouds punctuated by flashes of lighting.

spells.name: Storm of Vengeance
spells.description: A massive storm cloud forms in the air in a 360-foot burst.

spells.name: Summon Ancient Fleshforged
spells.description: You summon an ancient Fleshforged, one of Nex's personal weaponized monstrosities unleashed in the first wars against Geb.

spells.name: Summon Draconic Legion
spells.description: You momentarily summon an army of powerful dragons that unleash annihilating blasts as they descend upon your location.

spells.name: Telepathic Demand
spells.description: Send a telepathic message to a creature you've met. The creature must attempt a Will save or be compelled to follow a suggestion.

spells.name: Trim the Blight
spells.description: You create a cone of shimmering energy that attempts to banish the influence of invasive, supernatural blight, such as that found in Tanglebriar.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Ignition
spells.description: Trigger A foe reduces you to half your Hit Points or fewer.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Containment
spells.description: You wrap enemies in four strands of water.

spells.name: Undertaker
spells.description: You point your finger toward the target and whisper an epitaph that promises to grace their gravestone in the near future.

spells.name: Unfathomable Song
spells.description: Fleeting notes of a strange and unnatural song fill the air, overtaking the mind.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Crash
spells.description: You jump up to 120 feet in any direction and then deal 18d6 bludgeoning damage to creatures within a 20‐foot emanation after you land, with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Unspeakable Shadow
spells.description: You alter a creature's shadow, transforming it into a terrifying monster out to devour the creature.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Pillar
spells.description: You call upon the earth and your ki to shield you from your enemies.

spells.name: Upheaval
spells.description: The ground in the area shudders and crumbles as huge pillars of stone erupt into the air, rending the terrain around them.

spells.name: Voracious Gestalt
spells.description: You create a powerful spirit entity that grows and builds strength by consuming the spirits of foes you both slay.

spells.name: Wail of the Banshee
spells.description: Release a devastating wail in a 40-foot emanation. Fortitude save — void damage. On critical failure, the creature is immediately killed if at 50 HP or fewer.

heightening.perInterval: The damage increases by 1d10 for each rank above 9th

spells.name: Wails of the Damned
spells.description: You howl a lament of damned souls. Each living enemy in the area takes 8d10 void damage and must attempt a Fortitude save. Critical Success The creature is unaffected. Success The creature takes full damage. Failure The…

spells.name: Weapon of Judgment
spells.description: An immense weapon of spiritual energy appears, hovering in the air above the target.

spells.name: Weird
spells.description: Phantasmal Killer affecting all creatures in a 30-foot burst. Will save then Fortitude save. Can deal massive mental damage, frightened, and death.

spells.name: Wrathful Storm
spells.description: A massive storm cloud forms in the air above the area, spreading rain and gales.

spells.name: Alter Reality
spells.description: Warp reality to produce any effect of a spell of 9th rank or lower from any tradition. Alternatively, produce a unique miraculous effect.

spells.name: Apex Companion
spells.description: You focus on the energies of all members of your animal companion's species, transforming your animal companion into its apex battle form.

spells.name: Avatar
spells.description: Transform into a battle avatar of your deity. Gain a fly speed, AC 54, 30 temp HP, and your deity's special weapon. Melee attacks deal massive damage. Duration 1 minute.

spells.name: Cataclysm
spells.description: Unleash every element at once in a 60-foot burst. Each creature takes acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, and sonic damage. Reflex save.

spells.name: Conquering Soldiers
spells.description: You tap into the glories of the armies of old, bringing forth their might to your battlefield and making their strength and power your own.

spells.name: Dinosaur Fort
spells.description: You conjure a primeval fort with walls of sharpened wood adorned with dinosaur skin and teeth, up to 300 feet on a side.

spells.name: Dragon Turret
spells.description: Area (continued) an empty 10-foot radius, 50-foot-tall cylinder You conjure forth a massive tower with a large dragon that's bound to crawl its length.

spells.name: Element Embodied
spells.description: Drawing upon the deepest wells of magic in an elemental plane, you transform into a spectacular elemental.

spells.name: Fabricated Truth
spells.description: Make up to 5 creatures believe a stated falsehood as absolute truth. Will save. Duration: permanent on critical failure.

spells.name: Fatal Aria
spells.description: You perform music so perfect that the target may die of joy or sorrow.

spells.name: Fated Confrontation
spells.description: You weave the threads of fate to lead two foes into a climactic battle.

spells.name: Freeze Time
spells.description: You temporarily stop time for everything but yourself, allowing you to use several actions in what appears to others to be no time at all.

spells.name: Garden of the Green Man's Growth
spells.description: You cast your magic into the earth, calling out to a powerful green man, a verdant lesser deity of nature, to come to your aid.

spells.name: Gate
spells.description: Tear open a portal to another plane, creating a gate that creatures can pass through. Sustained up to 1 minute.

spells.name: Hero's Defiance
spells.description: Trigger An attack would bring you to 0 Hit Points.

spells.name: Indestructibility
spells.description: You sever yourself from cause and effect. For the duration of the spell, you are immune to any effect or damage that would harm you, excluding effects caused by artifacts, deific power, and similarly powerful sources. Y…

spells.name: Jassim's Allegiance
spells.description: You bartered for this spell in some strange market or perhaps gained it while wandering the desert, hopelessly lost and surrounded by nothing but the remnants of time and fallen empires.

spells.name: Manifestation
spells.description: You spin secrets from the fundaments of magic, shaping them into a power with nearly unlimited potential.

spells.name: Miracle
spells.description: You request aid directly from your divine source.

spells.name: Nature Incarnate
spells.description: The primal power of the world flows through you.

spells.name: Nullify
spells.description: Trigger A foe within range casts a 9th-rank or lower spell.

spells.name: Pied Piping
spells.description: Your performance enraptures listeners, compelling them to follow you.

spells.name: Primal Herd
spells.description: Summoning the power of the natural world, you transform the targets into a herd of mammoths, and they each assume a Huge battle form.

spells.name: Primal Phenomenon
spells.description: You request a direct intercession from the natural world.

spells.name: Remake
spells.description: You fully re-create an object from nothing, even if the object was destroyed.

spells.name: Revival
spells.description: Return all dead allies within 30 feet to life at full HP if they died within the last 3 rounds. Also heals all living allies to full HP.

spells.name: Shadow Army
spells.description: You create dozens of semi-real copies of yourself that swarm across the battlefield and fight your enemies.

spells.name: Song of the Fallen
spells.description: You chant a dirge or an elegy that either rouses the dead to action or reminds undead that they should lay to rest.

spells.name: Summon Kaiju
spells.description: You briefly conjure a kaiju, a massive, rampaging monster with a unique name and legendary reputation.

spells.name: Summon Oliphaunt of Jandelay
spells.description: You briefly summon the mythical Oliphaunt of Jandelay, unleashing a manifestation of pure destruction that obliterates everything unfortunate enough to stand in its path.

spells.name: Time Stop
spells.description: Stop time for all other creatures. You gain 3 extra turns in a row. You can't affect other creatures or objects during this time.
